Description: Weird Valley is an absurd comedy anthology hosted by a foul-mouthed, philosophizing Poop Bucket puppet who introduces a series of bizarre stories set in a strange Midwestern town where nothing—and no one—is quite right.

Undercover police detective ferociously hunts down drug dealers; bloody lovers fight for their own masters! Drug enforcement police officer Ahren shoulders his mission, venturing deep into the tiger's den, facing an uncertain fate; he infiltrates the side of the brutal drug lord, Brother Chen, only to discover that Brother Chen's own sister is actually his lover. On one side is the love of life and death, the bond of blood; on the other is the mission of drug enforcement, the adherence to justice. Amidst a shocking mystery, good and evil clash, and the forces of good and evil engage in a showdown; in a desperate battle, where should one go?

A poignant examination of the lives of residents in a small desert town where the primary industry is oil drilling. The work explores life in a town at the edge of the world; it's a portrait of the past, a town built in the early 20th century, where closed storefronts and boarded-up buildings now populate a desolate main street in a landscape where life has relied on the extraction of fossil fuels.

Film_title: Orfeo ed Euridice – Teatro Regio di Parma
Description: Premiered in 1762, Orfeo ed Euridice is a turning point in the history of opera. Freeing the plot from the conventions of the 18th century opera seria, Gluck introduces fluidity to the drama. The rigid alternation of aria and recitativo is abandoned; continuity and unity are the cornerstones of Gluck's reform. The movement of Gluck’s music - with its lyrical intensity and the interweaving of chorus, solo singing and dance - appeals to theatre makers from all horizons.
From a sanctuary of reunion to a site of sudden closure, a border park between the US and Canada becomes the stage where families and displaced souls navigate the tightening grip of political change.

Film_title: An Unlikely Fandom: The Impact of Thomas the Tank Engine
Description: An intimate look into the adult fandom of the popular children's television series "Thomas and Friends." Featuring interviews with both fans and series crew members alike.

Film_title: 五十年目の俺たちの旅

Description: There are songs that kill. The authors of these songs have millions of lives on their hands. One such song is featured in the film. It is well known that even the deadliest poison, in microdoses, can save a life—but in doing so, it takes far more. This poison is wiping out generations.

Never Fade is a multi-dimensional creative project led by Thai actress Yoko Apasra Lertprasert, best known for her role in the Girls' Love (GL) series Blank. It serves as a personal brand and production house launched after her departure from NineStar Studios. The film is expected to explore emotional themes of resilience.

Poseidon demands Medusa’s submission. Hoping to protect her, her sisters send her to live with the priestesses of Athena’s temple. But the god of the sea emerges from the waves and rapes the young woman, defiling the temple. To punish her for this desecration, Athena turns Medusa into a monstrous creature: her hair becomes a nest of snakes and her gaze turns anyone who looks at her to stone. This terrifying power arouses the lust of heroes, who pursue her in her exile…

On a winter hot-spring trip, twelve-year-old Dodie refuses to enter the water in the girly swimsuit her father bought. Feeling misunderstood, she hides by the poolside, watching the girls in the bath—none of whom look like someone she wants to become. Then, the calm, androgynous presence of Fujiko, a 69-year-old bathhouse worker, catches her attention. Dodie quietly steps closer…
Every psychopath had a story

Following his toddler son’s lengthy battle with a rare cancer a Ghanaian father living in Edmonton turns to advocacy for stem cell donation. With just a cheek swab, he goes from event to event, actively trying to get young Black Canadians to sign up for the stem cell database in hopes of saving more lives. His efforts are met with resistance due to the deep mistrust in the medical system by Black communities.

Film_title: The Other Side of the Bridge
Description: A former teenage boxing champion returns to the ring to save his trainer’s gym, facing a rival from a different part of Lagos.

DOMINION uses generative AI to reimagine early 20th-century encounters between coloniser and colonised, merging missionary films with speculative cinema. The result is a techno-magical history that upends archival truth.

The Yamazaki family arrives at Akikawa Station and heads into a cicada-filled forest to carry out a mission assigned by Headquarters Chief Tamura. With bug nets in hand, they excitedly begin their search, spotting a praying mantis and later a stag beetle—only to be startled by a sudden “black shadow.” After the scare, they finally find a rhinoceros beetle and celebrate like kids again. Having achieved their real goal of bonding, they spend the rest of the day playing in the river and enjoying a barbecue. Once fully relaxed, the general producer takes on the role of MC, and the group sets aside their characters to enjoy a “real summer vacation” as fellow actors. In the laid-back atmosphere, they share candid memories of joining Unification of Japan (Nihon Touitsu), their fellow Yamazaki members, and their feelings toward the director.
Three friends battle to keep their business afloat, turning to a mysterious passenger whose help changes everything.
A small-time goon and his friends agree to stage a fake kidnapping for a bride-to-be in exchange for ransom money, but their plan backfires when their hostage proves more dominant than expected.

Film_title: Touken Ranbu: The Musical - Higekiri Solo Performance ～Fleeting Dreams～
Description: One of the final installments in the Musical Touken Ranbu series, Higekiri tells the tale of famous folklore demons Ibarakidoji and Shutendoji and their fateful encouter with Watanabe no Tsuna.

Film_title: 夫妻いぢり放題 不貞のご対面
Description: Yui and Masao were childhood sweethearts who married into a loving couple, but at some point, their married life became dull and unfulfilling. Yui tries everything to repair their relationship, but...
An outcast orphan discovers her royal lineage and joins forces with a dragon prince to save an ancient city from a reawakened evil.
Eshaan Akbar performs his second comedy special 'Fool Moon' at the Top Secret Comedy Club, London, 2026.

We follow the trail of a mysterious torchlight procession (lampadephoria) on the Greek island of Naxos. As myths, memories, and faces unravel, we discover that the gods of the past may still walk among us through the hands of those who dare to remember and create.

Himuro (Yasukaze Motomiya) and Tamura (Yoshiyuki Yamaguchi) return to Kobe, where the Kyowakai executives—still without a clear successor—expect Himuro to become the fourth chairman. Himuro refuses, causing unrest. After meeting Ueki, Himuro decides to respect Kawatani’s wishes and announces only his retirement. At the same time, the Marugami-kai appoints Sakota as chairman following Mita’s death. Meanwhile, Sunaga of the Keihin Alliance approaches Shinjo and Komiya again. Although the information reaches Himuro through Kuroiwa, Himuro rejects it, saying he does not want the Marugami-kai to split. Himuro admits he wanted to make Kawatani the number-one boss in Japan and to unite the yakuza world, but Tamura encourages him to be honest with his own feelings. Elsewhere, the Yamazaki Ichimon learns of Shinjo and Komiya and tries to handle things themselves. During this, retired Kyowakai member Nakajima appears, and his new business becomes the spark for a new conflict.

A dejected man living in Los Angeles limps through a prolonged break-up and the distractions in the aftermath. Brian Follmer directs “Dys-Sympathetic,” a satirical featurette poking at casual sex, casual romance, and the emotional deterioration of it all. Tyler waits for his ex-girlfriend, Zoe, at a bar. We listen to his train-of-thought in the form of narration. He thinks about all the fake food he’s recently eaten and considers what he'll say about himself on his new Tinder profile. After hooking up once again, Tyler and Zoe try returning to “no-contact.” As Tyler begins a numbing, sex-induced bender, Zoe comes by his apartment, wanting more and sharing the news that she’s pregnant. Tyler acquires abortion pills, and the two experience it together at his place.
Peter is a young gay Indigenous man adopted by Acadian parents. Accompanied by his boyfriend, Darren, he sets out in search of his biological family while embracing his Wolastoqey heritage.
Burmese horror film.

Radio France, with the support of Lambert Wilson, Anne Sila and Gabriel Yared, pays tribute to the great film composer Francis Lai with a journey through his work, from A Man and a Woman to Black Eyes.
An adaptation of H.P. Lovecraft's Haunter of the Dark set in modern day Berlin

When paranormal livestreamer Jacie investigates the infamous Bridge 704 after a fan request, what begins as another ghost hunt quickly turns terrifyingly real. Directed by Dan Williams, the short blends urban legend horror and found-footage tension into a chilling supernatural encounter.

Film_title: Super Wings: Journey to the Center of the World

Description: A year after the death of her brother, a young woman joins her friends on a drug-infused getaway that spirals into a night of horror when an alien insect burrows into one of her friends, transforming him into a vicious man-eating creature.
In the sizzling sequel to Granny’s Place, Shawnte’ must make the best choice for herself and her children when she finds herself in a love triangle.
A kid with insomnia starts to see a ghost at night.

Max is a young and very successful property developer who leads a perfect life but after meeting a property investor named Ernesto, certain events occur that make Max question who he is actually working for.
WWE Superstars collide in an action-packed edition of Saturday Night's Main Event featuring championship clashes, intense rivalries, and unforgettable moments live from Fort Wayne, Indiana.

Film_title: I WENT to DUKHOTA’s TRAINING… (and embarrassed myself)
Description: in this video I am Yura Bilyi: for the first time in my life I went to a trainer, and it was DUKHOTA Sergey Viktorovich, a legend, after that I changed my life..

Film_title: Supertramp: Crime of the Century in Concert at Hammersmith Odeon 1975
La corta vida de las flores
Description: As they prepare for the arrival of their first child, a middle-aged musician and florist are forced to confront a long-buried memory that may redefine the truth of their relationship.

A feared rowdy-turned-politician, Gedela Raju, is murdered on the night of his political rise in Kakinada. As the investigation unfolds, seven interconnected lives-driven by secrets, ambition, and betrayal-lead back to one shocking truth behind his death.
Kyrgyz horror film

Caledonia (now Scotland), 137 A.D. While guiding his Roman master through the forest in panicked retreat from "barbarian territory", an indigenous Pictish slave receives signs from a pagan spirit that lead him to question his loyalties.
Follows a visually impaired girl and a boy who cannot walk as their lives intersect through a matchmaking arrangement.

In a devastated post-apocalyptic world, two travelers set out in search of their last chance for salvation. Their journey takes them through icy wastelands and mortal dangers, but every step brings them closer to a fateful choice, one that will determine not only their own destiny but also that of something they no longer remember.

Film_title: 津田寛治に撮休はない

Description: Mr. Wira is a teacher and scout leader for a group of his students. They plan to survey the location of the Scout Jamboree in Segosari village. Bagas, a big fan of the popular candy variety at that time, did not join his teacher and friends to visit the Village Head's house. Bagas was feeling unwell and just waited in the car. Upon returning from the Village Head's house, Bagas disappeared. The presence of Adit, a village boy who often gets bullied by other children, becomes an important key to finding Bagas.

Film_title: milet LIVE at Nippon Budokan 2026「Ray of Water」
Description: In February 2026, milet held a concert at the Nippon Budokan, her first performance there in three years. milet named this performance "Ray of Water" with the hope of "bringing a ray of hope to those who watch the live show." Various installations were used to transform the iconic Budokan stage into a fantastic space where light and water intersect and interact. The performance on February 14, 2026 was broadcast exclusively on TBS-1 with all songs uncut. Original behind-the-scenes footage from the program was also included.

Film_title: Nintama Rantarou 1st Musical Reboot: Good Luck, 6th Graders!
Description: This is a reboot performance that adds new production to the first "Musical Nintama Rantarou" performed in 2010. Will the 6th graders, who face a tough battle, be able to safely help Rantarou and his friends? Unless!?

Cheerful and inventive Zlata, who stays at home alone for the sake of the school ball and the first kiss, under the supervision of the newest robot nanny Notrix. Confident that she can easily trick the car, Zlata soon discovers that she is dealing with an invulnerable opponent who controls the entire house. Desperate, she and her neighbor Nikita, who is in love with her, find an unconventional way out - they begin to communicate with the robot in its language, using "perfect promts". Their friendship with their iron friend is rapidly gaining momentum and leads to a huge party, which turns into real chaos. It is at this moment that Zlata has to make a choice and understand what true friendship and self-sacrifice are.

Esther Figueroa composes a four-part work from 31 Surinamese films that focuses primarily on mining and the physical destruction of workers’ bodies; she reinforces this critique with activist song lyrics.
Daska goes on an epic adventure across the galaxy in search of the mythical golden microphone, to record the greatest podcast episode of all time.
The movie revolves around a woman writer who, after going through a divorce, finds love again with a publisher who intends to marry her.

Ditching traditional melodrama for raw grit, the story offers an authentic dive into the Indian judicial system. Set within the corridors of a district court, it highlights the human cost of bureaucracy and the grueling struggle for justice through a stark, realistic lens.

Without the lifeline of communication, four immigrant families find life in America full of obstacles. As they persevere, pursuing the simple goal of learning English, they cross paths with Americans eager to help, form lifelong friendships, and discover a new sense of belonging.

Malati and Mangales navigate love, sacrifice, and life's harsh realities, where emotions clash with responsibilities, revealing the fragile yet enduring bond that keeps them together through pain and change.
After a near death experience, an incredible little girl named Gabriella is given the miraculous power to heal and act in God's name.
A vlog about a perfect day, trying to make my day perfect but encountering difficulties.

The film follows Martins, escaping a dangerous past that endangers his life, as fate draws him to fiery Anabelle—stuck in an abusive nightmare. Sparks fly amid tension, but his secrets summon a deadly assassin. Will love defy the hunt?

Film_title: Super Wings: Journey to the Center of the World

Description: An adaptation of H.P. Lovecraft's Haunter of the Dark set in modern day Berlin

A vlog about a perfect day, trying to make my day perfect but encountering difficulties.

From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Giuseppe Mengoli, performs Arvo Pärt’s *Fratres*, Antonio Vivaldi’s *Stabat Mater* (featuring countertenor Carlo Vistoli), and Ludwig van Beethoven’s Symphony No. 7 in A major, Op. 92.

Four girls get trapped in a cabin when a cryptic note reveals their only chance of survival is to play a series of deadly games that forces them to confront their deepest fears. Every hour, one girl is chosen to play a game to face unbearable pain-or make another suffer. With time running out, they must find a way to escape before the clock strikes again.

Film_title: WICKED WONDERLAND 4: THE TICK OF TIME
Description: When Quinni and her friends are pulled into the past, they must witness the heartbreak of Young Red and Young Tiana to realize that some things in time cannot be fixed—only forgiven.

Joep Beving is a giant of the neoclassical piano scene, in every sense of the word. To mark ARTE Concert’s Piano Day, the Dutch artist introduces us to the subtle flights of fancy found on his album "Liminal", released in 2026.
The film centers on Jin Wanfu and is based on the historic “Battle of Shentouling Ambush.” It brings to life a stirring chapter of China’s War of Resistance Against Japan.
As his restaurant crumbles and his wife battles cancer, an Italian American owner's fate collides with a driven Middle Eastern immigrant chasing the American Dream and his legacy.

From Venice's Teatro La Fenice, the traditional New Year's Concert conducted by Maestro Michele Mariotti, featuring arias, duets, and choral pieces performed by soloists Rosa Feola and Jonathan Tetelman. The event will be enhanced by dance performances by étoiles Eleonora Abbagnato and Friedemann Vogel.

Film_title: うちの弁護士はまたしても手がかかる
Judge Me, I Walk on Glass
Description: 'Judge Me, I Walk on Glass' deals with addiction through the life story of the director‘s son who has over the past 20 years struggled with the disease. The film follows his struggle while describing the author's experience as the mother of a child who developed an addiction from the age of 15.

'Quicksand' is a documentary about the Icelandic middle class today. Despite fulltime work, many struggle to make ends meet. The film follows a family of five in Akureyri, revealing how systemic forces shape their daily lives and economic reality.
J. Nicole, a divorced Black mother of three, navigates the challenges of daily life in an unfiltered portrayal of her struggles and triumphs.
A snapshot into the lives of several people living in small town Minnesota.

For generations, the residents of a remote village in Kalimantan have upheld a sacred tradition of making offerings to the Mariaban—an ancient ritual believed to guarantee an abundant harvest. But when this deeply rooted custom is broken, the Mariaban's terrifying wrath is unleashed. One by one, lives are violently claimed, and the nights descend into an endless, waking nightmare.
Dickie Vincent returns to the race track after 50 years.

The sailor's daughter Senta takes pity on the centuries-old legendary figure of the Flying Dutchman. He was condemned by Satan to sail the world's oceans until a woman frees him from this curse through her loyalty. One day, when Senta's father returns home from a long voyage with a mysterious man, Senta is the only one who recognizes the Flying Dutchman in the sinister foreign captain. At the cost of self-destruction, she decides to redeem him. Director Christine Mielitz and her set designer Stefan Mayer see Daland's and the Dutchman's ships as an image of the entire world, of life itself, in which we all have to find our way around.
The weekend of her album release “Florescence”, Maisie Peters hits the Big Weekend stage performing hits such as ‘Questions’, ‘Lost The Breakup’, ‘My Regards’ and more.
In a rural community plagued by health crises, corruption, and drug mafias, Veena fights to protect an abused child while grappling with her estranged, ailing mother and her drug-addicted daughter.

Set in the 18th century, Maragatha Malai follows a zamindar, Parthiban, who protects his ancestral treasure from a ruthless gang led by Kabala Vendan. During the conflict, his family gets separated when his young son goes missing in the forest. Years later, through struggle, fate, and divine grace, the family reunites and safeguards their legacy in this period fantasy adventure.
Based on Qazi Anwar Hussain's novel series Masud Rana aka MR-9.

Director: Thibaut Buccellato, Loukia Hadjiyianni et al
Description: From the streets of Budapest to the fields of Poland to the beaches of the Mediterranean, women in love grapple with their affections, desires and dreams in these five exciting, moving and sexy short films from up and coming directors.

"The House" is a K-occult thriller film that follows the story of Yumi, a protagonist who can see the souls of the deceased. The film depicts the eerie and chilling events she encounters after moving into a new apartment.

Knives have a long history, almost as long as mankind itself. An invaluable tool, first made of stone and later forged in metal, essential for countless everyday activities, from farming and hunting to cooking. Its use as a weapon is just as ancient. However, it is only in our times, in this century, that the knife seems to be making a comeback as a weapon, and with a clear political connotation at that; wielded by extremists acting alone among unsuspecting crowds. The Radical Self takes on the responsibility of investigating the phenomenon of this particular form of terrorism perpetrated by jihadists. The consistent effort to comprehend it, from a historical, political, and psychological point of view, asks the viewer to direct both gaze and mind toward a space of liminal (and certainly terrifying) psychosocial realities and cultures.
A series of bizarre, comical crimes spirals into chaos, taking a dark turn when characters become trapped in crocodile-infested floodwaters, leading to a deadly encounter with the predators.

Jack is a hustler chasing big scams with new partners, forced to choose between another con or a better life. Little Towns is about growing up too late, loving at the wrong time, and learning that escape isn't freedom without change.
The film is dedicated to the 100th anniversary of the 1926 Baku Turkological Congress.

Film_title: Träume und andere Realitäten: Rückblick auf 30 Jahre junge Welt

Description: The film is a chaotic, comedic road trip that begins when a journalist disappears, sparking rumors involving "Big Brothers". Satya (Gowrav Shetty) impulsively takes a car, only for Madhu (Shwetha V) to jump in while fleeing goons. A masked man, Munna Bhai (Gilli Nata), joins them later, turning the journey into an unpredictable adventure filled with eccentric characters. The story blends comedy, light romance, and crime, ultimately concluding with a courtroom scene.
A daring warrior defeats a merciless tyrant to protect a runaway girl.
Three brothers face a ruthless gangland trial after their heist goes disastrously wrong.

For weeks now, nightly attacks on guard posts in the underground realm of Bad Vöslau have been increasing. To counter this threat, elite soldier Commander Nix is sent by Head of State Anderson to activate the Horny Heinz Cooperation. This hitman organization, led by the dimwitted Heinz Rüdiger and his mysterious administrator Lu Yeet, now sets out to take on the case. But will they succeed—and what’s really behind these attacks? Who is responsible, and what is their goal? With a mix of humor, intense action, and deep intrigue, the assassins are forced to confront a truth that pushes even their moral boundaries.

David Minerba, also known as ‘Dopeman’, is ready with his new stand-up show of the same name. In ‘Dopeman’, David takes the audience into his life as a comedian and rapper - with honest and funny stories about loyalty, friendship and being David, seen through his own eyes. From his childhood in the football club B93 in Østerbro to life as a 23-year-old man with something on his mind. "To be honest, I'm just excited! I'm looking forward to being on stage. I'm looking forward to showing people what I can do. And I'm looking forward to enjoying it. I've been working on this since I first saw stand-up and I feel more than ready." It's fast-paced from start to finish and there's not a dull moment. So hurry and secure your ticket - before it's too late!
One dawn, one girl, one light bulb. The rest is hope.

Film_title: Nintama Rantarou's Theater Troupe: Dorm Stories ~5th years, Yesterday, Today, and Tomorrow~
Description: This is the story of "a certain three days" in their everyday life that seemed like nothing but was special. Would you like to take a peek into their lives as they laugh with their friends and grow a little?

A social work student visiting Kamathipura for her research becomes an unexpected witness to a bizarre dilemma when a local pimp and several sex workers struggle to perform the last rites of an unknown elderly sex worker because no one knows her caste or religion.

Étienne de Crécy is a pioneering figure of French Touch. Over 30 years, he's released major albums and remixed for Kraftwerk, Air, Moby, and Lil'Louis. His 1997 cult album Super Discount embodied the elegance and boldness of French electronic music. From punk bassist to sound engineer, Crécy has always embraced experimentation across projects and collaborations. A passionate DJ known for intense live performances, he electrified audiences at the 2026 Ososphère event, where Strasbourg train station became a monumental dancefloor. Lights, tension, energy: his set captivated the crowd. Filmed February 13, 2026, at Strasbourg station, France.

Film_title: To be Judged by the Fool
Description: After a devastating loss, a young man enters a forest with a camera, speaking into the void as his grip on reality begins to shift. Fragments of a fairy tale echo his path, while a figure known only as The Fool lingers nearby - unseen, uninvited, and slowly closing the distance.
A judge learns the shocking truth about her husband's criminal and romantic history when he's framed for the brutal assault of a pregnant woman.

Film_title: Moon Walker- Full Set (Live in Newport, KY 4/16/26)
Cecilie Bau - Når du mest venter det

Description: Nothing Planned deals in after-images. From the hallucinatory flicker of oscillating film projectors to the apparitions peering back from his found subjects; Lary 7’s audio/visual assemblages imprint on the mind’s eye a picture of what’s “not junk yet”. Built from the workhorses of an image-making industry now gone bloodless, these teetering assemblages whir, tick, slice and warp their own mechanical and optical logic, held together mostly by invention — equally ready to sing as to sputter a last gasp.

In the early days of liberation, banditry is rampant. Xiang Yang, a reconnaissance platoon leader of the People's Liberation Army, is ordered to go to Sanwanli to suppress bandits. Going undercover, he reunites with his elder brother Xiang Tian, who has become the third leader of the bandit gang Qingfeng Stronghold, and they have a fierce confrontation. Yang remains steadfast in his convictions as he outwits intelligence, burns the granary, and coordinates with his comrades outside to launch a siege. Facing the brutal counterattacks of bandit leaders like Blind Long, Yang leads troops to fight bloody battles. With the sacrifice of his brother Tian, they finally completely wipe out the bandit gang. After the battle of blood and fire, this land finally welcomes the dawn of peace.

Inventors Yu Shu and Liang Lan create "The Hyper-Cortex," a groundbreaking artificial intelligence capable of recreating extinct ecosystems. But when their son falls critically ill, in desperation, Liang Lan partners with a mysterious investor, Mr. He, to build the lucrative "Mecha-Eden Park," while Yu Shu, a purist, flees with his son, believing their creation is too sacred to be put on display. Years later, as their son's time runs out, Yu Shu returns, handing over the final piece of the puzzle. The source code is stolen and corrupted, and the majestic creatures of mythology become machines of destruction. In the chaos, a broken family must find a way to reunite before the colossal monster, their creation, devours the world...

Film_title: Let's Talk About the Film Wonderen uit Pygmy-Land
Description: 1926 marked the Dutch and American colonial expedition to Dutch New Guinea, later documented in Matthew W. Stirling's film By Aeroplane to Pygmyland (1927). Mahardika Yudhas latest film Let's Talk About the Film Wonderen uit Pygmy-Land documents the exhibition, discussions, and informal conversations he staged in Jayapura in August 2025 to revisit the infamous expedition and its lingering repercussions in Papua, Indonesia. In this research sketch, he maps the aesthetics of colonial film and how they continue to infiltrate Indonesian cinema and interpretations of history more than a century later. Yudha reflects on how these decidedly one-sided colonial archives can be used to recuperate lost traces of Papuan heritage and form a new basis for Papuan cinema today.
The story about resilience of people living in the mountains of Nepal, navigating survival and hardship.

In the final part of "Bugun-Bylyr 3: Time Running Out," Vasya and Rosa will face the consequences of time travel. Something in the distant past begins to influence reality, and a mysterious ruler and conqueror appears on the pages of Yakutia's history...
Set stellaire de Vinyl Lovers

Fritz Davis volunteers for a mysterious memory study. Once he begins to question the knowledge that this organization has, he's removed and the details of interview become a blur. Something has shifted within him, and he slowly begins to witness memories of someone from his past...
On the brink of suicide, a down on his luck rideshare driver picks up a cancer patient with 48 hours to live and discovers during the journey that life is too precious to throw away.

Film_title: Junior - Solo Ao Vivo No Rio De Janeiro

Description: A group of independent filmmakers attempt to create feature-length films under extreme limitations. With little money, limited time, and no safety net, each filmmaker is forced to confront the realities of their own process; balancing ambition, doubt, and the constant pressure to keep moving forward. As production unfolds, the film captures the unpredictable nature of creation, revealing how ideas evolve, collapse, and rebuild on the path to completion.

In the magical Candy World, a powerful Fountain of Sweetness begins to corrupt after losing its friend and decides to destroy the world to create a new one. As chaos spreads across the candy land, a kind jelly named Baddy discovers the truth and tries to stop it. Instead of fighting, Baddy attempts to heal the Fountain’s pain and save Candy World before everything is erased.

Godaan tells the story of Surbhi, an Indian cow who transforms a modern scientist’s beliefs. Her presence leads to discoveries in Panchgavya-based medicine, sustainable living, and the spiritual science behind cow reverence.

Shiva is an Intelligent. Smart College boy, Pooja a pretty young girl from a rich family study in the same college, Pooja falls in love with Shiva behalf of his kindness and gentility. Pooja decides to meet her Divorcee Mother living in Kashi, then Pooja going to Kashi with Shiva to meet her mother. Unfortunately Pooja met with an accident and hospitalized in Brain dead condition. Police takes Shiva to custody. Pooja’s Father Manipal and Uncle Sunil rushes to Kashi on search of Pooja, then all four go in search for Pooja all around the Kashi and Find her in Hospital at last in a brain dead condition. What happens next? Is she recovered from Brain dead condition, is the joins with Shiva? Is the twisted climax of the story.

Naina, a simple village girl chasing her dreams in Bhubaneswar, finds love with her charming colleague Prem, until one shocking night turns her world upside down. Arrested in a high-profile drug smuggling case, she must fight to prove her innocence as a dark conspiracy begins to unravel, testing love, trust, and survival.

Jija Jung Bahadur, a man who knows everything about nothing, lands at his in-laws' home and turns life upside down. His ego and antics spark endless clashes with brothers-in-law Pinky and Gogi as they prepare to marry off their sister.

With the participation of Aloïse Sauvage, Madeleine Cazenave, Joep Beving, Legowelt, and Chloé Antoniotti, ARTE Concert celebrates Piano Day with a musical stroll through the new spaces of the Théâtre Nanterre-Amandiers.

"Time for Laughs" is a classic stand-up show with quick-witted humor, built on Al Pitcher's characteristic interaction with the audience. In these strange times, Al wants to make us laugh at all the typical Swedish phenomena that he still marvels at.

Film_title: Sakari Orama conducts Saariaho and Mahler With Verneri Pohjola
Description: The Orchestre Philharmonique de Radio France and Finnish conductor Sakari Oramo celebrate the memory of composer Kaija Saariaho with a performance of one of her last works as well as Mahler's Symphony No. 5.

A popular filmmaker sets out to make another movie when a filmmaking rival brings a curse upon the set. The cast soon become their characters and romance turns up in unusual places. Chaos is everywhere, battles erupt and it's a race against the clock to lift the love spell.

Film_title: THE RAMPAGE Live Tour 2025 PRIMAL SPIDER
Description: THE RAMPAGE's live tour final in 2025 from Osaka.

Film_title: May All Six Aspects of Life Go Smoothly

Description: Seeking refuge from a past she can't outrun, Maria returns home. But when an unexpected connection with a gentle stranger stirs hope for something more, she's forced to confront the truth: love can't always save us from who we've been.
An unlikely meeting with a mysterious man - Chris - leads Rai to obsessive ends.

Cast: I Nyoman Agus Hari Sudagama Giri

Description: From the Laetrile craze to the COVID-19 infodemic, the film explores how decades of institutional deception and corporate greed birthed a fatal era of science denial and fringe conspiracies.

Sema and Uğur’s wedding organization will be handled by their closest friends and also their maid of honor and best man, Ela and Doruk. Although there is an immediate attraction between them when they first meet, Ela refuses to work with Doruk. Doruk takes this personally, and a fierce rivalry begins between the two. While Doruk tries to sabotage the plans Ela prepares for the bride, Ela does not hesitate to undermine the arrangements Doruk makes for the groom.
They took his lucky foot. Now he'll take their lives. Jackrabbit Biker. This summer.

Through candid interviews, narrative flow, and a hybrid combination of observational and archival material, the film explores Margaritari’s unique self-expression. At its core lies their artistic practice within the fields of comics and the independent queer pornographic scene.

In Cambodia, former Khmer Rouge child soldier Aki Ra and his wife Hout help communities reclaim their land by undertaking the potentially lethal task of clearing unexploded landmines left over from years of war. Along the way they adopt unwanted kids whose childhoods and limbs have been destroyed by landmines, and open a war museum that soon becomes world famous. Aki Ra fights to break free of shadows cast by his role in the genocidal Khmer Rouge regime, and rebuild his shattered family. But in a country grappling to come to terms with its history, the past always has a way of catching up.

Film_title: Ataysal. The Land of The Fathers
Description: A successful top executive, Yulay, returns to his native village to sell his late father's farm, but becomes entangled in a conflict with a ruthless farmer, Jafar, over a herd of horses. To overcome the challenges and win an equestrian wrestling competition, Yulay brings together three teenagers, for each of whom the sport becomes both a personal challenge and a path to adulthood. Ataysal is a story about how, through hardship, hard work, and a deep connection to one's roots, a person finds themselves and learns to become a source of strength for others. This film is a family adventure drama about returning to one's roots, generational continuity, and the transformative power of mentorship.
A maniacal clown named Zenno terrorizes the teenage population of a grimy town.

Power Slap 19 is scheduled for April 17, 2026, in Las Vegas, coinciding with WrestleMania weekend. The event will feature former WWE and AEW star Jake Hager (Jack Swagger) in his heavyweight debut, likely against Brian Ellis. The card is expected to include a high-stakes super heavyweight bout.

Fighting More Than Fire is a documentary that explores the untold history of Black firefighters in Tulsa, Oklahoma. Through personal stories, first-hand accounts, and following a “day-in-the-life” of these heroes, the film captures the struggles and triumphs of the men who broke barriers in a segregated fire department.

A chronicle of Lefkada in 1960, documented through archival material by a member of a Swiss humanitarian organization, whose work constitutes photographic anthropology. The spontaneous images became windows into moments and relationships of people who, in a harsh environment, gave their best. Through them, coexistence, survival, dignity, and culture are recorded as a heritage. The island in Western Greece serves as a reflection of a shared experience in mountainous and semi-mountainous areas of the country and brings to life an era that will never return.
Kunjappa, a poor old man, dies in a village. As his relatives gather with the body through the night, small incidents unfold, revealing quiet human truths.
Hoshimachi Suisei Live “SuperNova: REBOOT" at K-Arena Yokohama

Film_title: Stanislav Vavřínek conducts Brahms and Dvořák @ La Folle Journée 2026
Description: The Hradec Králové Philharmonic , an orchestra which specialises in Central European music, gives its debut at La Folle Journée festival in Nantes, France. The Czech ensemble performs music by Johannes Brahms and Antonin Dvořák, conducted by Stanislav Vavřínek.
A compilation of pint-sized shorts and parodies that appeared throughout the 1980s as interstitial entertainment between movie and TV programming.
From the vast randomness of the universe, countless alternative life forms emerge. Among them, fragile and delicate, human life reveals itself as something precious, quietly worthy of celebration.
She flirts with a stranger at a bar - only to wake up and find he's her CEO - and her ex's father
In a society where aesthetics have become marketing, a young woman pays a heavy price. Viewed as a product, Nina no longer knows who she is or what else she can be besides beautiful.
A widow and a priest dream of reality -- as reality dreams of them

Masha spent her entire 11 years of life with her cosmonaut father at the spaceport. She knows how to fly a plane, a boat, and take responsibility for herself, but she doesn't know how her peers live. To make friends and get used to life on Earth, she goes to a regular school in St. Petersburg, where her incredible adventures begin.

Young children go on adventures. Sometimes their imaginations take them far from home, and then suddenly, out of the blue, a child finds themselves alone in an unfamiliar world, on an unfamiliar street, surrounded by strangers. That’s a problem. But it doesn’t just happen to children.
In a swipe-right generation, an unromantic boy dares to love the old-school way and proves that staying real is the boldest move of all.

After failing to kill herself, a teenage girl with a celebrity crush on the devil must dodge her well-intentioned yet clueless loved ones' intervention efforts as she pursues her mission to go to hell.
A lonely postal courier inherits his deceased father's camera. Immersed in the world of film photography, he begins hunting for crime stories, unaware that he himself is being hunted.

Best friends Jack and Benji race to uncover the mystery of the strange signals transmitting from their town. Could it be proof of Aliens living on Earth? They have three days to find out or risk being split up forever.
How Madeleine McCann's mother Kate came under suspicion to face police interrogation.

Frozen People is a unique festival of electronic music and northern art on the frozen sea next to the Finnish city of Oulu. As part of Oulu2026 European Capital of Culture, the event brings together international and Finnish DJs Sanna Mun, Paula Koski, Schacke and Winter Games in truly arctic conditions. Welcome to the world’s iciest dancefloor!

Bidhyabati, an 84-year-old matriarch, had spent the last decade of her life living with her son Kumud and daughters Janaki and Puspa in the United Kingdom. Bidhyabati had raised 10 children in Nepal.She want to celebrate Chaurasi Puja.

A couple's last hope for a child leads them into a world of surrogacy, where desperation meets opportunity. But across the border, the woman carrying their baby is fighting a different reality - one where survival comes at the cost.
Grieving the loss of his father and reeling from a divorce, a man returns home in search of his roots, but finds only fragile connections and a longed-for solitude that brings him back to square one.
The evening stages from Y-Concert by YeaH1, the 10-hour music festival for 55 artists.

During a paragliding competition, a man is found dead. He is none other than Capucine’s ex-boyfriend who has just won first place. She had recently left the latter because of her jealousy and alcohol problems. He had, however, discovered elements about the disappearance of Romain, Capucine’s little brother, 20 years earlier. In parallel, the team is preparing to participate in a bike race for an association. Commissioner Cassandre risks slowing down her team and Lieutenant Maleva learns of her pregnancy.
A Film By Amirhossein Ajalli

Film_title: Doremi Dalimi the Movie: Sing-Along Party

Description: The Wakamatsu-gumi and Munakata-gumi successfully rescue Shuhei and wipe out the Jojima-gumi. Shuhei is set to become wakagashira and lead both the Wakamatsu-gumi and the Aizu Federation. A strong bond forms between Sawamura and Shuhei after they promise to each lead their own families. Meanwhile, Soma meets his sister’s fiancé, detective Shigefumi Yanagita.

The investigation of a seemingly ordinary murder in the wilderness confronts operative Nyurgun Vasiliev with a difficult moral choice: to follow the letter of the law or to show human compassion. This dilemma becomes the main test for the hero, revealing new facets of his character.

When a beloved gay Catholic school teacher is fired for marrying his husband, he refuses to disappear quietly. Through music and personal storytelling, Communion follows his path from heartbreak to resolve, inviting audiences to wrestle with faith, conscience, and the true meaning of love and Church.

Sena simply wants to change his fate. But at an exclusive massage resort, his body is sold, his soul is bound, and his life is at stake. Now he must choose between submission or fighting to the death.

As she prepares to help her daughter-in-law give birth, Habiba Zaid, a Franco-Algerian midwife, offers women who have experienced violence a path to healing: a therapeutic expedition on Europe’s largest glacier, in an attempt to be reborn to themselves.

Spring reveals the secrets buried under the Sapenay pass, overlooking Lake Annecy. As the snow melts, a hiker discovers in a cave the body of a woman, killed by a bullet through the heart. Near this still anonymous victim, two other bodies, men, lie under the snow, frozen for years.

Film_title: In The Name Of The Father
Description: Three years ago, anti-drug police officer Daqi lost his comrade in an undercover operation. Filled with guilt, he lived in seclusion in a small southern town, secretly protecting his comrade's daughter, Xiaodie. Xiaodie was curious about this silent neighbor, but her life took a sudden turn when she was abducted. Daqi's dormant police spirit awakened, and he embarked on a life-and-death pursuit alone. Can he keep his promise to his comrade on this path of redemption?

Keywan receives a call from a woman in Iran asking him to find her son Ashkan in Cologne, whom she hasn't reached for three days. Despite having minimal interaction with Ashkan, Keywan accepts the request.

11-year-old Ilyas loses his parents too soon. Overnight, he and his sisters are sent to an orphanage - where kindness is rare and rules are strict. Growing up fast, facing down bullies, scraping for food, and protecting his sisters like a wolf guards its pack, Ilyas refuses to break. And through it all, he clings to the idea that family isn’t just blood; it’s who stands by you when the world turns its back.

A gripping story of a man torn between circumstances and conscience, who is drawn into the dark world of crime. As his choices spiral out of control, only the unconditional love of his parents keeps him grounded.

After discovering an old book, Alex becomes drawn into the harrowing stories of cowboys Latt and Stylz. As he reads about their treasure hunt and daring adventures, Alex finds inspiration in their courage and friendship to use in his own life and help him find the strength to overcome his own obstacles.

The film delves into the rich and profound emotional world of Cao Xueqin, one of China’s greatest literary masters, drawing on the most moving chapters of his life. Through an intimate portrayal of his relationships with three pivotal women—Fang Qing, He Xiang, and Yun Mei—the story reveals Cao Xueqin’s deep sensitivity, compassion, and breadth of spirit.
A lonely little Firefly's just sitting around, until his best friend, Fast Fly, flew over to give him a surprise hug.

After losing his Job his wife, and his daughter, Frank takes a job as a waiter but the relentless cruelty and humiliation from the staff push him past his breaking point, sending him on a violent, vengeful rampage.
A stop-motion animation.

Film_title: Riccardo Chailly dirige la 9e de Beethoven - Scala de Milan

Description: As a wedding and fiesta draw near, two former lovers surrender to a forbidden passion that threatens relationships and defies a town built on judgment.
After discovering being trapped in a time loop, Carl has three more chances to make things right to break the loop or be blinked out of existence forever.

Enter Brisbane’s Theatre of Magic at Rydges Hotel and discover an evening where elegance meets illusion. Recently crowned a 2025 TripAdvisor “Travellers’ Choice” Award winner and ranked among the top 10% of experiences worldwide, this hidden theatre features world-class magicians, a spellbinding selection of food and drink, and award winning sleight-of-hand artists. Don’t miss out—get your tickets today for Brisbane’s Theatre of Magic!
An Armenian–Azerbaijani–Georgian feature film about love, friendship, identity, and politics in the South Caucasus.
Some connections are written in silence.

Okay, so this one’s got all the classic Motu Patlu chaos but with palm trees and beach vibes. Ghasitaram goes missing, turns out he’s been kidnapped by this goofy-looking don named Michael Pinto who looks exactly like him. Cue the identity swap, the fake vacation, and Motu losing his mind because he thinks his best friend ditched him for Goa without him. 😅 Honestly, the part where Motu starts crying about how they used to share everything — even underwear —? That hit harder than I expected. It’s silly, but also kinda sweet. The wild action, food fights, jet skis, invisible cars, and Patlu pretending to be a ghost? Pure cartoon gold. The bad guys aren’t super scary, but they’re fun to watch get wrecked. And the ending? All of them cruising along the coast, laughing together? Perfect. If you’re a fan, you’ll enjoy it. If you’re not? Still worth a watch if you need a silly, feel-good 30 minutes.

Lewis enlists his top agent, Alex Lapierre - aka "The Shepherd" - for a mission that's as high-stakes as it is dangerous: eliminate a list of targets for Tania Edwards, a powerful and enigmatic woman tangled in a massive scandal. But things quickly take an unexpected turn. A mysterious bounty hunter, known only as "The Ghost," enters the picture with a very different agenda: to take out both Tania and Alex, but on whose behalf? Caught between the conflicting demands of his superiors and his own growing doubts, Alex faces a tough decision: follow orders and remain the loyal soldier he's trained to be, or be swayed by Tania's allure and question everything he believes in.

An Arasa woman who aims to make a comeback in her life and change her career to a strip dancer. On the day she came for an interview, she caught rumors about the police's care. In addition, the disappearance of dancers and the biggest pinch of the board! A story of a small theater fighting to protect the show, causing a great commotion and emotion!

Director: Adrian Bobb, Ali Chappell et al
Description: Deep in the heart of the jungle exists an elemental creature with an eternal hunger. Once every quarter century it emerges to feed, and every time its fate is entwined with the same human family.

Film_title: Ensemble Stars! The Stage -Our First Fight-
Description: Stage Adaptation of the Ensemble Stars! story, Quarrel Festival.

"Wonder World" follows Bret, a young man who secretly dreams of exploring the big, wide world. Little does he know that after wishing on a falling star one night, his wish is about to come true! With the help of the mischievous wish-fairy, Hailey, Bret is transported to Wonder World, the magical realm where dreams come true. But, as Bret’s about to find out, getting everything you've wished for isn't always all it's cracked up to be…
2026 release

The year is 1942! Indian freedom struggle in full swing. A little village in coastal Maharashtra, Bombilwadi, is also contributing. A theatre group is setting up a social reformist play as well as some villagers are preparing a bomb to blow up the police station. On the world level, there is world war two! Germany vs Britain, Hitler vs Churchill. Adolf Hitler has to leave for Japan for some important work. But he accidentally lands up in Bombilwadi. The story takes hilarious turn to resolve national as well as international situation!

There is a dark secret in the Khosrov Forest that dates back centuries. Iago has long since found the chest containing the heart of king Khosrov Kotak, hidden in the rocks as the source of the forest’s life force. However, it remains closed to him, as it can only be opened with the blood of a royal heir. From that moment on, Iago and Marusik are doomed to wait, searching for the only one through whom they will be able to open the chest and finally seize the power and authority of the forest.

Every year ARTE organises a concert during the Berlin Film Festival. This year British indie band The kooks are invited to perform at the Columbia Theater, a converted cinema. They play old favourites and tracks from the seventh studio album, Never/Know.

Brothers in smalltown New Zealand make pocket money off of tourists who visit a local cave, said to be the home of a mythical bird-woman. One night, a terrifying encounter leads the boys to drastically change their business model.

Within the Aizu Federation in Fukushima, tensions escalate between the Wakamatsu-gumi and the Jojima-gumi. Gravely ill Wakamatsu boss Heigo Otake seeks help from the Toyo-kai. Aiming to gain a foothold in Tohoku, the Toyo-kai entrusts protection of Otake’s son Shuhei to the Munakata-gumi. Ryuichi Sawamura and Kunihito Soma find Shuhei after he escapes an attack by the Jojima-gumi.

After leaving her lucrative job to pursue writing, An Nuoxuan is left broke and heartbroken, only to reunite with Su Ziqiao, a man she once helped and who has secretly loved her ever since. As cohabitation turns from conflict to romance, misunderstandings and family pressures test their bond—until they choose each other and finally realize both love and their dreams.

A journalist moves into a mysterious seven-storey building, each floor symbolising one of the seven deadly sins. As he ascends each floor, he finds himself on a journey full of twists, turns, and trials.
A film by Fitsum Kibret

Film_title: Lego Stop Motion Darth Vader vs Rebels

Description: Celo's birthday night turns sinister after she discovers her boyfriend Montey may be leaving her for another woman. When the mysterious Margaret Wellington enters her life, Celo is drawn into a disturbing world of control, ritual, and devotion.

Three years ago, Mu-young travels to Moscow in search of inspiration for his next novel. At Red Square, he encounters a woman in a white dress, wearing a wreath and crying alone. By chance, they meet again and begin a love that feels destined. For three months, they share an intense relationship in Room 318 of a hotel on Arbat Street. Then one day, she disappears, leaving behind only a single note. After her disappearance, Mu-young finds himself unable to write. Driven by memory and longing, he wanders through the streets of Moscow, searching for traces of her presence. A story of creative suffering and human longing for art, of a fated love that spirals toward ruin and loss—Moscow.
2 Pirates Battle Enemies when everything takes a dark turn.

On March 28, 2026, at the Cinema La Compagnia in Florence, his music will come to life in concert thanks to a collaboration with the Florence Pops Orchestra: a musical journey spanning over twenty years of his career, featuring iconic film scores and melodies that have moved audiences around the world.

Film_title: Stratford Festival: A Midsummer Night’s Dream
Description: Strange things happen in the woods by night, with neither spirit nor mortal safe from the wiles of the trickster Puck. For mismatched lovers, romance runs delightfully amok, but true love triumphs at dawn.

Surya, a National Geographic photographer who struggles with a rare speech disorder, travels to Ooty to capture a rare bird and unexpectedly meets Charu, a lively orphan trapped by a forced marriage. Desperate to escape, Charu decides to fall in love with another man, while unknowingly growing closer to Surya during their birding journeys.. On the day Kathir comes to take Charu away, fate stands still—leaving one haunting question: will love choose truth, or sacrifice?
A Bounty Hunter is trying to get revenge on thieves who are stealing people's lands, while being hunted down by most dangerous western gang boss.

Film_title: The Forgotten Prince: The Mystery Of The Duke Of Kent
Description: George VI’s younger brother, Prince George, the Duke of Kent, died in a military plane crash in 1942. This documentary explores his life and the circumstances surrounding his untimely death; and attempts to shed light on the many theories and questions that have been raised over the years.

"Top 100 Craziest Jets Moments" counts down the most unbelievable occurrences in Jets history since 2015. From player controversies to bizarre coaching decisions, this hilarious countdown features a slideshow of wild images and anecdotes. Prepare for a rollercoaster of unbelievable moments spanning a decade of Jets football.
A live-recorded acting workshop demonstrating effective acting techniques and on-stage performance methods, hosted by Remo Vinzens

Spanning more than four decades, this documentary explores the innovation, culture and excellence that have defined the Australian Institute of Sport through candid interviews with athletes, coaches, scientists, and leaders. This film provides an authentic perspective on high performance and the people behind Australia's sporting success.
The film follows Malcolm a middle-aged man who leads a group therapy session for dysfunctional monsters that have been kicked our or disowned from their own kind.
Collaboration concert footage featuring RIIZE and THE RAMPAGE from EXILE TRIBE.

‘margins of unfinished self’ is a work that explores the shifting boundaries of the self. It draws on micro narratives and sonic fragments that move through grief’s reshaping of time and identity – moments where scepticism sits alongside yearning, where the mystical brushes up against the everyday, and where multiplicity begins to feel like a condition of being.
Dirt Nap is composed of one-minute excerpts from 46 naps Rick Silva took in nature across the western United States between September 2024 and January 2026, sequenced in the order they were recorded.

Film_title: Voyage voyage, les stars chantent au Maroc

Description: In a dark night, a man takes help of a cyclist to get petrol for his motorbike.

Film_title: Летом всякое бывает. Побег из Сколбора
Description: Eleven-year-old Zlata becomes overly engrossed in gaming during the holidays, ignoring her parents requests to clean up the dishes, review math homework, and walk the dog. Her father confiscates Zlata's gaming devices for the rest of the holidays. Zlata is deeply upset and, before going to bed, wishes, "To play forever, without any limits!" In the morning, Zlata's wish comes true, and she finds herself playing the game, but soon realizes that playing 24/7 isn't as exciting as she thought.
An upcoming Indian feature film currently in development. The project approaches myth and futurism with restraint, exploring responsibility, balance, and human choice without spectacle or exposition.

The film is based on real-life events. Alena, a voice-over star, suddenly discovers that her voice has been stolen by the developers a major bank's neural network. Now her voice can be heard everywhere—from airport announcements to entertainment and gaming platforms. Alena realizes that in the modern reality a person's voice does not fall under legal protection. Thus, not only voice-over actors but everyone is at risk. The actress starts a struggle for the right to her own voice.

Director: Brett M. Butler, Jason G. Butler
Description: A celebrity couple invite two of their biggest fans for a weekend escape, with each duo harbouring an ulterior motive.
In 2046, Britto was digging in his land when he discovered something that soon became news.

The film tells the story of an 11-year-old girl, Dada, who suffers from psychological distress and troubles due to a sudden change in her family situation, leading to emotional depression and withdrawal, ultimately forcing her to drop out of school. Her mother has no choice but to send her to live temporarily at a horse ranch run by her cousin.
Studios: 北京浩昊科技发展有限公司

Description: Set in early 1900s China, this film follows young Mao Zedong, Cai Hesen, Xiang Jingyu, and Yang Kaihui as they study at Hunan First Normal School. It captures their quest for knowledge, purpose, and a revolutionary path to save the country.

Two families from different social strata happen to be neighbors in a hotel in Sri Lanka. Adults are not very happy about this coincidence. But their twenty-year-old "children" fell in love with each other. In order to spend less time with annoying dads and moms, young people embark on their romantic journey through an exotic country, losing track of time. Fathers of families, concerned about this development, set off in search of their adult children, but suddenly they themselves are captured by the aborigines.
“From the Folklore of Punjab”

Film_title: J. Kreičmaņa stendaps: Puņķi un asaras

Description: Walter, a farmer living in the mountains, hides an undercover cop hunted by criminals. The arrival of his daughter, Daria unearths Walter's buried past. In the silence of the mountain, a brutal reckoning erupts, where redemption comes through fire and blood.

From the shadows of a London kitchen, a humble Sikh porter discovers he is heir to a legendary warrior order. As darkness threatens humanity, he must rise as the Ninth Master to f ight for the fate of the world.

In a rural village, a strange phenomenon arises in which people are driven to kill the one they love most. Mi-jo, the village's most powerful figure, steps forward in the name of the greater good. But as the truth is revealed, she comes face-to-face with her own desires—and unveils her bloodstained nature.
Is she an angel or a demon? Her fairy-like transparency is a must-see!
A high school teen struggles with peer pressure and drugs, navigating choices that could shape his future forever.

Film_title: Concerto di Pasqua dal Duomo di Orvieto 2026
Cast: Orchestra e Coro del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino
Description: From Orvieto Cathedral, the traditional Easter Concert. The Maggio Musicale Fiorentino Orchestra, conducted by Maestro Daniele Rustioni, performs Wagner’s *Tannhäuser* Overture and Brahms’ Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73.

Brayden, a young 17 year old boy, faces conflict and self doubt as he navigates the complexities of one's first love. Supported by many, he remains in question and fear until crossing paths with the one who changes everything - Thomas.

A journey into the “atelier” of the engraver Christoforos Katsadiotis, where traditional engraving converges with the moving image. His artistic gaze upon society, religion, and human nature. The vandalism of his works at the National Gallery by a member of Parliament sparked a profound public discourse on the freedom of artistic expression.

Film_title: Fátima - A Filipe La Féria Opera Rock
Description: Fátima - Ópera-Rock is not just a show; it is a profound reflection on Portugal, its history, and the cultural, spiritual, and human dimensions that project our country onto the world stage, touching people from every continent and religion. Inspired by the events of 1917 in Cova da Iria, where three children were at the center of a phenomenon that resonated universally, Filipe La Féria created a script and musical score that will remain in the memory of Portuguese theater.
A young man's debs night is turned on its head when a secret threatens to devastate his relationship and future plans.

Trying to find her missing parents, Lena, a schoolgirl, unexpectedly finds herself in the fairy-tale world of a Faraway kingdom. She becomes a student at Baba Yaga's School, and the heroes of Russian folk tales become her teachers. To bring her family back, Lena must cope with the challenges.
Iain finds himself in a conundrum when his christmas doesn't go as planned as usual.

After losing his daughter in an accident, Zhang Shiquan falls into a cult, chasing a "miracle medicine" to save his gravely ill son. But when they target his wife, he finally wakes up. He joins her to expose the scam, bring them down, and get his boy real medical care.

This story is centered around the Sri Ramaswamy Temple in the village of Ramanjira and the family home in Chemmangad, where the rituals of the templeare traditionally performed. Vasudevan Ezhuthachan, the head of the familyhome, was always a refuge for the villagers. The door was never closed to thosewho came hungry. However, it was his neighbor

Two small-time con artists are mistaken for murder suspects and forced to stay in town to find the real killer. As strange events pile up, they uncover a mystery linked to one man’s long-recurring dream, turning a fight to clear their names into a chilling search for the truth.
Khmer horror film

The legendary Soul-Guiding Lantern, said to hold the secret of immortality, tears the Tianfeng Sect apart with Hua Qiansheng leaving the sect. Twenty years later, Tao Yun saves Yue Luoxi, whose awakening becomes the key to the lantern’s power. As Hua Qiansheng returns and the past resurfaces, Yue Luoxi is drawn into the long-buried feud and faces him in a final battle among the ruins of the fallen sect—where destiny, ambition, and the price of immortality collide.

oosely inspired by the Baba Yaga folktale, With Iron Teeth follows Sam, a young woman who works at senior center by day and scams the elderly at night. But one fateful evening, Sam and her new hookup Emerald learn that stealing from the wrong old lady has terrifying consequences.
A team of soldiers are sent to investigate a strange anomaly near enemy lines, only to discover that their mission holds far more dangers than they initially bargained for.

A young girl, Lily, suffers the loss of her boyfriend, Jake. The relationship with her and Jake's siblings is still unresolved, and looking forward to a weekend hangout, Lily hopes things will get better. Luckily, a new friend to Lily showed up for her, just in time.

Some paint their beloved in the seven colors of the rainbow, some bring down the stars to adorn their lover’s hair, and some are willing to give away cities like Samarkand and Bukhara for a single beauty mark on her cheek. But what will a doctor, returning from America to his village, offer to the woman he loves?

Film_title: Only ONE Person Can Leave This Room...
Description: I did it! I made an escape room that only one player out of everyone would be able to beat. And I did it all in vanilla Minecraft without commands as well. There's a lot of cool tech in this video that was mainly discovered by me so shout out me. Also shout out Big Dxs This video is like 20% escape room and 80% improve 😭 I mean I did say I'm not an escape room creator...

Film_title: Antonia Bembo : Ercole Amante @ Opéra de Paris
Description: Having fallen in love with his son’s fiancée, Hercules refuses to accept her rejection. Directed by Netia Jones and conducted by Leonardo García-Alarcón, the Baroque opera by Venetian composer Antonia Bembo makes its debut in the repertoire of the Paris National Opera.
A novelist struggling with writer's block interviews his wealthy estranged college roommate and his wife, where an old secret threatens all of their safety.
High school senior Tommy Kyle decides he wants to be president of the English Society. All that stands in his way? The most popular girl in school, and a political campaign to last the ages.
Life begins to imitate art as an Off-Broadway actor is forced to grapple with his own shame during a stage production of "The Scarlet Letter."

Grímsey is an island 40km north of Iceland, the northernmost inhabited area of the country measuring 2.5 km in length. It has been populated for over 800 years, but now their future is uncertain. This film is a elegy and celebration to a fading way of life.
Starrig Raj Kundra and Payal Rajput

It is June 18, 19**. On this astonishingly hot afternoon, Étienne Pignon is sitting—unusually upright by his standards—at the head of a long, lavishly set table on the shore of a lake, grinning from ear to ear.

The deaths of children in the village are believed to be due to the Sandekala myth, a time considered terrifying in the afternoon. Bayan is a child who has lost his friends. However, behind this incident, it turns out there is a dark secret: a soil-fertilization ritual. Slowly, the truth is revealed, including who is behind all the deaths.

Neurosurgeon Gera is a good specialist, and patients love him, because he saves lives. But deep down he is unhappy, because he chose this path only because his late mother wanted him to. Hera's true passion is cinema, he always dreamed of making films. One day he finds out that he is terminally ill and he does not have long to live. Hera wants to spend the rest of his allotted time doing what he really loves: making movies.
Studios: Ministry of Culture of the Russian Federation

Description: Khmer horror film.
A grieving mother and daughter who retreat to a remote farmhouse for Christmas, only for a mysterious package to unleash a malevolent force that turns their family reunion into a fight for survival.

In Limoges, the porcelain capital of France, a factory worker is found dead with a porcelain spike driven through his chest. The investigation is assigned to Captain Paul Artuis, newly transferred from Lyon, and Commander Estelle Meyer, a local native. Blending humor and tradition, the duo delves into the secrets of the Langedamont workshops, where Estelle must also confront her own father, the owner. Their investigation leads them to an old art theft, uncovering a web of family grudges and buried secrets where past and present intertwine.

Film_title: Pēteris Vasks at 80 - Concert from Aizpute, Latvia
Description: Pēteris Vasks is one of Europe’s great contemporary composers who mixes a deep connection to nature with a profoundly Christian understanding of the world to create his meditative music. This concert is a tribute to the Latvian composer on his 80th birthday with the Latvian Radio Choir and Sinfonietta Riga. Programme: - Sava tauta for choir - The Fruit of Silence for choir and orchestra - Cosa devo fare for choir - Agnus Dei for choir and orchestra - Musica Serena for orchestra Da Pacem Domine for choir and orchestra - Actus Caritatis for choir - Mein Herr und mein Gott for choir and orchestra

Film_title: Sergey Khachatryan Performs Khachaturian Alain Altinoglu & the Frankfurt Radio Symphony Orchestra
Description: Sergey Khachatryan and the Frankfurt Radio Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Alain Altinoglu, perform Aram Khatchatourian's Violin Concerto. Also on the programme, Igor Stravinsky's 'Rite of Spring'.

In the heart of Kenya, an Irish pastor with no coaching experience teaches his athletes something more important than running: how to change their lives. At 2,500 meters on Kenya’s legendary Tenth Hill, brother Colm O’Connell turns the unknown Iten into a cradle of Olympians, shaping not only champions, but visionaries.
While Murph is moving out of her apartment after ending a long-term relationship, she finds a box of her ex-boyfriend’s old things and sorts through them to find closure.
About a Smart Killer
A film by Henok Dinku

A member of the Japan Self-Defense Forces, Lieutenant Kasuga, was assigned to the earthquake-stricken area. Though he had lost his wife and young daughter in the tsunami, Kasuga concealed his own grief and devoted himself entirely to his mission. At an evacuation shelter, he encountered a boy named Kazuki Yoshimura, who had also lost his family and shut his heart. As Kazuki quietly observed the Self-Defense Forces at work, he eventually began to help people around him as well. Two people who met at the depths of despair decided to believe in hope and began to move forward. A story of “rebirth”, arising from loss.

In 2032, the crew of the Selene 13 faces an unexpected disaster on their mission to explore Mun, leaving them isolated and without communication with the Kerbal Space Center (KSC). Determined to return to Kerbin, the Kerbonauts Mark, Cooper, and Ryan face a series of challenges as they battle against time and the hostile environment. With limited resources and unpredictable obstacles, each team member will be tested to the limit, transforming this journey into a true test of survival, loyalty, and courage.
2026 release

The steady and wise Xu Wenxuan, the quietly demure yet fiercely rebellious Bai Ruoxue, and the duplicitous Haishi—three strangers who first cross paths in a digital realm. When their virtual encounters bleed into the real world, their lives become inextricably intertwined, blurring the lines between fantasy and reality in a complex tale of love, deception, and the masks people wear.
A Film by Kirubel Seyoum

As a singer and musician in This is pop, Zélien Zénon, Calypso and now as a duo with Sophie Massa for the synth-pop sound of À trois sur la plage, Liza Bantegnie, from Douarnenez in Brittany, founded the Cartelle label with Margot Oger in 2022. Dedicated to today’s female scene, and more broadly to artists from gender minorities, trans or non-binary people, it has released a number of eclectic compilations ranging from pop and post-punk rrriot to electro and noise. Her taste for searching out, adventure and dance will underpin her explosive mix at 360 for Travelling 2026 where she will perform as Liza Liza !

An undercover police officer and a former special forces soldier unite to dismantle a powerful drug cartel after a ruthless kingpin destroys their families. As they fight through corruption and violence, their shared mission for justice forges an unbreakable bond.

In 53 Spaceships 2 NYC detectives - Rene (Sujewa Ekanayake) and Allyson (Alia Lorae) must find 53 hidden, ancient spaceships that have now gone missing, and due to a security system that was altered the ships are at risk of engine core meltdowns that may create an ever expanding black hole or 53 of them that will destroy the planet and perhaps the entire universe. The lives of the space aliens from the Massive Positivity Galaxy (Andromeda galaxy) who brought over the super ancient spaceships millions of years ago are examined - for clues to a passcode that's needed to stop the core meltdowns. Will the detectives find the missing ships in time - they have 14 days - to save the world and perhaps the universe? Find out in the fast, funny, very sci-fi comedy.

Annie, a 35-year-old former dancer, plows through each day desperately wanting to be the best mother, wife and provider she can be - and she’s been successful. She’s removed dance from her life so completely that even in her dreams dance is pushed behind closed doors. When a rival from Annie’s past makes her confront her feelings, she must decide if she’ll continue to lock her dreams away or allow the deepest parts of herself to take the stage.

A blindfold over the eyes will guide the transition each situations -- from the past, present, and future. Through this, Jade will be revealed as a womanizer and a deceiver, but behind his deceptive heart dwells a child longing for care and a victim of violence.

After nearly 10 years following the death of sorority big sister Zariyah Redding, someone is harassing those suspected of involvement in her death. Everyone attending college homecoming night has a different story.

While grieving over a tragic loss, Danny, a young and amateur MMA fighter, is forced into a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse. Using the skills he’s learned, Danny must push through a deadly fight in order to survive the night.

A struggling artist painter on the brink of eviction and a vintage curator haunted by inherited dreams skip the corporate future they're supposed to want and spend one day discovering whether love is worth the risk.

Film_title: Te Land Ter Zee En In De Lucht Winterspecial 2026

Description: Annie takes her friend Erin randonauting for her 30th birthday, hoping for a fun night of exploration and adventure. But as the pair follow increasingly strange coordinates, the outing spirals into an unsettling descent captured entirely on camera.

The wealthy Grewal family seeks a traditional, perfect bride for their son, Rajdev, aided by matchmaker Masi Chatroo. However, Rajdev falls for Priya, a modern, independent woman, challenging the family's traditional values.
The first film made in Bangladesh about Cerebral Palsy.

A university student investigates the truth behind a high school incident. As testimonies and rumors collide, the truth begins to blur, and her own past actions come into question. A youth suspense drama exploring collective psychology shaped by cycles of spread and conformity.

Itlu Kanmani follows Rohith, a young man who once dreamed of becoming a filmmaker but leaves everything behind to take care of his ailing father. After his father’s sudden death, Rohith discovers something unexpected that changes the way he sees his father and his own life. Haunted by unanswered questions and fragments of the past, Rohith begins a journey to understand a story that was never told to him. As hidden memories slowly unfold, he realizes that some dreams never truly disappear they only wait for the right person to continue them. With the support of Chaitra, a compassionate doctor who becomes his emotional anchor, Rohith must decide whether to keep running from his past or face a truth that could change his future forever. Itlu Kanmani is an emotional story about love, sacrifice, and a mystery hidden inside a father’s silent life.

After a devastating cyclone displaces a fishing community, they seek refuge only to fall under the control of ruthless drug dealers. Amid the turmoil, a carefree young fisherman is forced to grow up after a personal tragedy, torn between love and his duty to protect his people, as he rises to stand against oppression.

Travel to Kakuma Refugee Camp in northwestern Kenya, one the world's biggest refugee camps and home to nearly 300,000 people. In an investigation into the realities of long-term displacement, the film follows five refugees representing different income levels within the camp: from Rose, among the poorest households, to Maker, one of the better-off residents. Each protagonist shares their story in their own words, offering intimate portraits of work, family life, ambition, and survival. By focusing on representative lives, Refugee Stories challenges dominant media narratives that depict refugees only in extreme situations, revealing the quiet inequalities that shape daily existence and determine what people can eat, learn, hope for, and plan.

Film_title: Honto ni Atta! Noroi no Video 115
Description: 115th entry in the popular "Honto ni Atta! Noroi no Video" film series.

The Senakulo 2026: Ang Sanhedrin of St. John Bosco Parish - Tondo unfolds through heated deliberations among council members regarding Christ’s influence, interspersed with poignant flashbacks to His teachings on love, compassion, and justice. As the debate reveals the envy and fear driving the council’s judgment, the film invites the audience to reflect on the pressing realities and issues in today’s society. Ultimately, "Ang Sanhedrin" challenges viewers to find renewed strength in the example of Jesus - inspiring a commitment to the path of love, truth, mercy, and justice in a world often clouded by power and corruption.

Postwar Ueno: lawyer Yone Yamada’s sister is attacked and the truth buried. Fueled by rage, Yone writes “Article 14” on a wall and, after reuniting with Taichi Todoroki, opens a law office to fight for the oppressed.

The modern architecture of the airport aims to control bodies in motion through the denial of location. The spatial channeling of consumerism functions as distraction from the immense environmental damage caused by kerosene. I carried a silicone doll through the terminals, and it was harder than I had expected. I was sweating and nervous.

Director: Sergey Kudryavtsev, Konstantin Rassolov et al
Description: He falls in love with her, and she reciprocates. But she disappears from his life forever, as if she never existed. This story repeats itself, albeit in reverse, with those involved in the film. And in the end, it's not she who disappears, but he. What remains as a lasting memory of this brief moment of happiness?

In a world heading towards climate breakdown, All the World is Green takes us on a journey to discover how much what we put on our table fuels climate change. Through the guidance of scientists, academics, activists, journalists and philosophers, we embark on a journey spanning from China to the USA, leading us to discover how our love for animal products took over our food system, pushing our ecosystems to the verge of collapse for the profit of a handful of corporations. After a journey stretching through Asia, America and Europe, the film leaves the viewer with a choice: remaining part of the problem, or becoming part of the solution.

Film_title: Persians – A Journey in the Array of Souls
Description: A cinematic film that utilizes footage and recordings from a theatrical performance to present Aeschylus' Persians in a contemporary and unique way.
