The aim is not to document the production process but to create a standalone work of art, an independent cinematic experience that engages with Aeschylus' classical tragedy in today's context.

Film_title: Bert Visscher: Dat zie je een ander niet doen

Description: Paco Saavedra is a struggling comedian whose life flips overnight when a livestreamed scuffle with a gangster goes viral. Suddenly, he’s a national hero, a meme, and the internet’s newest obsession. But fame is a double-edged sword. As Paco is thrust into instant stardom, he battles to separate his true identity from the clown persona the world demands — even if it costs him the woman he loves.

Behadd is a Gujarati Film about a girl who falls for a boy hiding his true identity. When her father learns the truth, he and his friend race to save her from lies. A gripping tale of love, faith, and betrayal in modern-day Gujarat.

When a group of campers is sent into the forest on a routine firewood expedition, their trip takes a terrifying turn when they become the targets of two relentless killers. Separated from their friends and stranded deep in the wilderness, the survivors must navigate mountains, lakes, and abandoned shelters as they fight to stay alive and find their way back to camp before it's too late.

After a rebellion is crushed by the rats in the sewers of Los Santos, the rats return to a mostly peaceful life until Rattakus is forced to make a difficult decision that will change the fate of every rat in Los Santos.

Director: Franck Hourliac, Bassem Ben Brahim et al
Description: Are we destined to make the same mistakes in life? Is my teacher attracted to me? Is this more than just a one-night stand? Will my family forgive me? What does the future hold? For these lost souls around the world questioning their paths in life, there are a multitude of answers.

Film_title: Jules Massenet : Werther @ Opéra Comique, Paris
Description: Goethe's masterpiece set to music by Jules Massenet can be rediscovered on stage at the Opéra Comique, conducted by Raphaël Pichon and directed by Ted Huffman.

When a wealthy divorcée reunites with her ex in Room 409, their secret tryst is interrupted by another woman, igniting a dangerous triangle of lust, deception, and revenge that could destroy them all.

Film_title: Blog de LOS ANGELES, LAS VEGAS, SAN FRANCISCO, entre otros
Description: Blog of LOS ANGELES, LAS VEGAS, SAN FRANCISCO, among others

Leonard, a taxi driver in Los Santos, hears a mysterious voice through his earpiece, threatening him with a bomb. Trapped in his own cab, he’s forced to commit crimes, and realises that all he can do is keep driving.

In a post-apocalyptic future, humanity teeters on the brink of extinction. Karna, an immortal being created by Meghnath, is tasked with locating the legendary Syamantaka Mani, a gemstone capable of shaping humanity’s fate. Bound by duty, he traverses desolate cities and ravaged landscapes, guided only by his creator’s command.
Livestream of the final tour of J-pop group, Arashi.

Film_title: Concert for Europe 2026 With the Berliner Philharmoniker
Description: The Berlin Philharmonic with Kirill Petrenko perform their annual concert for Europe, this time from the baroque magnificence of the Esterházy Palace in Austria. On the programme are works by Haydn, Stravinsky, Tchaikovsky and Beethoven.

Director: Mar Puig, Mateu Peramiquel et al

Description: The romantic comedy follows Soluchi, a hopeless romantic still healing from being jilted by her former lover, Kalu. When a regular work call puts her in touch with the charming Eli, Soluchi begins to see the possibility of the love story she has always wanted.

In The Unforgettables (Les inoubliables), 13 women interpret in their written languages the texts of 25 deceased women poets from different continents and eras who never met but nevertheless shared similar sentiments. Across eight scenes they respond to each other, producing a series of conversations about the constraints imposed on women, about wars and struggles, about writing and the boundaries of language, about relationships and the places we occupy in the world. Told in timeless black and white, the poems underline the extent to which the issues they address transcend time and space.
In a small Midwestern town in 1973, the disappearance of a 14-year-old girl unravels buried secrets. An unexpected twist shocks the community years later.

Two different stories set on opposite coasts share more in common than meets the eye. The shared arc of their lives reveals the devastation that substance use disorder leaves in its wake, the power of a little grace, and how love can light the path to redemption.

Film_title: Black British Music at the BBC: Volume 1
Description: Trevor Nelson presents a compilation of performances by British-born black artists from the BBC archives. Featured acts include Stormzy, Emeli Sandé, Olivia Dean, Hot Chocolate, Billy Ocean and many more.

Gu Hongyuan is burdened with the shackles of a storage ring. He pretends to be loser while practicing in seclusion on Yunxiao Peak. He is forced to guide his junior Tang Ning and becomes involved in the dispute over the secret realm. The Xuantian School allies with Bai Li and Yu Sheng, and steps into a dangerous place for spiritual stones and the Hunyuan Contract. Facing the resurgent and violent Bai Ze, he breaks the shackles of the ring and breaks through to the Nascent Soul stage. He returns with the Hunyuan Contract, but the dark aura seeping from the depths of the mural indicates that a greater crisis is brewing.

Light Body / Shadow Body was originally created as an audience interactive durational performance installation for Emersions production company in Asheville NC USA - December 2017. ‘Acting Like Humans’ was an immersive environment of about twenty simultaneously running performance installations that audience members could visit and interact with. The premise of ‘Acting Like Humans’ was an experiment to program a group of Robots with the artificial intelligence to understand the human experience. Each Robot had a specific human scenario to enact.

Set in the late 1990s along China’s southwestern border, the film follows forest police officer Liu Zhao and his team as they encounter a cross-border drug trafficking syndicate during a routine patrol. Deep in the dense jungle, they engage in a tense manhunt and fierce confrontations with the cartel leader Jiede. After a life-and-death struggle in the wilderness, they ultimately succeed in safeguarding national security.

Mashenka's grandmother tells her a fairy tale about a magical land where tangerines grow that grant wishes. Dreaming only of her mother's recovery and return home, the girl sets out in search of the magic tangerine. But the fulfillment of wishes is under threat all over the world, as an evil minister is poisoning the magic tangerines.

A young woman, newly-escaped from Georgia’s Ossabaw Island, navigates the swamps of Spanish East Florida on the way to a free life in Catholic St. Augustine when she discovers that in order to survive, she must both battle and befriend a volatile landscape.
Sequel to the hit horror flick.
What if the first memory of our life becomes the last memory we ever have? The story of Viradhya, and Vishwa - an emotional drama film.

Film_title: カイマナエレエレ 橋本梨菜

Description: A day in the life of four students in what is considered the worst class in the history of the school, as they confront unscrupulous teachers, sex, drugs and a math test.
Stage play of the show with the same name.
Royal Rumble 2026 Post-Show

What happens when the "God of Cricket" and the Lord of the Universe reside under the same roof? Krishna Aur Chitthi is a soul-stirring family drama that explores the thin line between fandom and faith, proving that when an intention is pure, every prayer, whether addressed to Vaikuntha or Wankhede, reaches the same destination
Society shuns a single mother, who raises three of her daughters out of wedlock. As the daughters grow up, they find their own ways to fight the social and personal challenges they face.

Six girlfriends, gathered around a festive table, unexpectedly discover they are all in love with the same man, who goes by different names and changes his personality and image to suit each of them. Who is he and what does he want from them? The friends band together and devise a plan to expose and punish him. A perfect date night movie for all lovers, with an engaging drama where the antihero becomes the hero, and true love conquers all obstacles and prejudices.
Dallen is Evil now

Destitute and desperate, China is forced to the edge, taking up work as a truck stop sex worker just to survive. Into this grim reality storms Ze, who has come to town seeking vengeance on Angie's sister—the woman who murdered his brother, Tez. But Ze's plans are bigger than just revenge: he aims to rally and recruit every woman working the highway.

Film_title: Notre-Dame de Paris : les 10 secrets d'une cathédrale mythique

Description: Milana receives a long-awaited gift from her parents—a puppy named Dippy. Her joy knows no bounds, but one day, while out for a walk, the girl gets distracted, and the puppy gets lost in the park, left all alone to face the big city. Dippy meets a street cat and a rat named Bangs, and even falls in love with a Chihuahua named Tabby. While Milana searches for her beloved pup, exciting adventures await Dippy—adventures in which he must become a true hero, capable of protecting not only himself but also his friends.
A man finds himself at odds with a reality that refuses to stay consistent.

Lost In ’82 follows a group of high school students whose lives change when a homemade time machine accidentally sends several of them back to 1982. Stranded in the past, they must navigate an unfamiliar era while trying to stay hidden and find a way home. Meanwhile, their friends in the present race to rebuild the machine and reopen the portal. Connected by a mysterious diary that allows messages across time, the two groups work together to plan their return. As prom night approaches and a powerful storm offers their only chance to reopen the time gate, the students must act quickly before the opportunity disappears and they risk being lost in the past forever.

2 Years after killing The Bandits and avenging the death of Lola Brently, Mack Coker's life on the run takes a deep turn when a girl named Morgan Brassil recruits him to take down Travis Ramos, a coke addicted leader of a cult that's looking to summon a drug lord.
A fierce family rivalry sparks a desperate plan to go abroad, but lies, love, and chaos soon reveal that true happiness lies back home.

Early 20th century, Paris. Mr. X, a mysterious circus performer never seen without a mask, stirs hearts and stirs rumors in Parisian society. The beautiful Theodora, a young, wealthy widow, is the envy of all high society. To win the heart of this brilliant socialite, circus talent alone is not enough. And does her love really matter to someone who has chosen solitude and decided to hide their face forever behind a mask?

An assassin and his partner go on a mission in the Center of Shabla. One of them admits they want this to be their last mission, after which planing to purposely get caught by the police to escape this way of living. Things go terribly wrong as the two spiral into a confusing line of events.

Volume 4 picks up where the series left off in 2011, as a non-narrative regionally focused meditation. This installment makes its way across Eastern and Central Europe, moth tracking from the Baltics to the Balkans, fluttering about the Caucasus region. With a curiosity for the ordinary, 'places in pieces vol. 4' is an observation of quiet moments, contemplating time and memory. The film score is composed by Adam Parks (Lighting White Bison).
2026 release

Film_title: 猪猪侠大电影之竞速小英雄

Description: Claire navigates through her twisted psyche as she further disassociates into isolation. A chance encounter from an unimaginable source could change it, or can it?

Film_title: Call Me When You Can: A Father's Day Story
Description: Work obsessed entrepreneur Roy Walker must rebuild his fractured relationship when his estranged daughter arrives at his secluded beach condo one Father's Day, forcing them both to confront past mistakes and rediscover what truly matters.
Two investigations collide, pulling Gary Travis's private investigation team into a web of digital deception and unexpected government attention.

SOCIAL COHESION LIVE! brings live experience of a MUDRAT show into the home, capturing MUDRAT’s sold-out hometown performance at The Northcote Social Club during the SOCIAL COHESION Tour in September 2025.

Mitya, a recent high school student, dreams of fame, but has no idea what price he'll have to pay for it. A random car accident, captured on a cell phone camera, makes him a hostage to a frantic media frenzy. He's caught in the maelstrom of political games and becomes a tool for garnering millions of views for his talk show. However, even this isn't enough for the media. Mitya tries to escape this cycle before he's buried in the news feeds.
Studios: Ministry of Culture of the Russian Federation

Description: Jaeron, whose birthday is the Fourth of July, celebrates every year watching the fireworks with his family. However, on his 12th birthday, a serious thunderstorm upsets familiar plans. Jaeron holds out hope, but doubt creeps in, and he begins to question whether his family still cares about him now that he’s older — intensifying what will become his most defining birthday yet.

I HAVE A NAME is a powerful, true-story-inspired drama that follows Gary and Lily as a simple act of compassion—taking in a young foster child—pulls them into a complex system that forever changes their lives. As they navigate the harsh realities of foster care, including abuse, separation, and trauma, the film offers a raw, honest look at a broken system while calling for awareness, compassion, and change.
After a traumatic life change, a girl strives to get her shit together whilst indulging in bad habits, and with a mindset centred on her past.

The film revolves around the character Jiga, dubbed "Seva Bhavi" (meaning a selfless helper or server), who is always ready to serve the community. The story focuses on his humorous interactions and, as suggested by character teasers, his "social service" activities that create a "full-on entertainment" experience. The plot involves engaging character work and comedic situations, including characters like "Dalsukh," designed to make it a family-oriented watch.
A Film By Biniyam Sinkneh
Follows the journey of Sachin, a young man caught between his passion for professional gaming and the heavy weight of real-world responsibilities.
Porsche and Chakrit’s vacation turns tense after a minor mishap ruins the mood. Feeling the pressure, Porsche slips away to a bar where he unexpectedly runs into Beer, an old friend.

Film_title: Legowelt plays 2001, A Space Odyssey Piano Day 2026
Description: For ARTE Concert’s Piano Day, producer Legowelt reimagines the soundtrack to a cult classic: Stanley Kubrick’s 2001: A Space Odyssey. A cosmic experience, straddling the line between the synthetic and the organic.

Film_title: Seal – Purpose: Celebrating 30 Years of the Classic Albums Seal and Seal II (2025/2026)
Description: The Grammy Award-winning British soul icon performs a celebratory concert at The Venetian in Las Vegas three decades after the release of his self-titled album Seal and eponymous follow-up Seal II. Joined by longtime producer Trevor Horn, he performs a set highlighted by classic chart-topping anthems “Crazy,” “Future Love Paradise,” “Killer,” and “Kiss From a Rose,” as well as a few surprises. Directed by Keirda Bahruth (Hardcore Devo) and with intimate interviews interspersed throughout, it’s a stunning film that shows this extraordinary artist at the top of his performance game.

Film_title: 45e Festival mondial du Cirque de demain

Description: After his father's murder, a young man hides in his abandoned family home, surviving while confronting suspense, horror, and supernatural events leading to an unforeseen climax.

While writing a screenplay for successful film producer Sally Kimmer, twin brothers Austin and Lee learn of their true sibling rivalry. As tensions rise, Sally finds herself having to prove herself worthy to her pushy boss Mr. Williams.

Film_title: 松田好花卒業セレモニー
Les Bodin's ouvrent un gîte : La suite

Description: A young YouTuber obsessed with viral challenges accidentally turns his life into the biggest real-world game ever played. What starts as simple online challenges slowly becomes: life-changing friendships unexpected love secret rivals betrayals million-dollar decisions Every episode answers one question… and creates two new mysteries. “He thought he was creating content… until content started creating his life.”

Studios: Công Ty Oppa Huy IDol Entertainment

Description: Royal Rumble 2026 Countdown show

In ancient times, wizards fought each other for ancient artifacts that gave them power over the world. Many of them died in battle. And one of them, the Wizard, spent many centuries searching for the relics. In our days, schoolgirl Sonya accidentally discovers the artifacts, not knowing about their magical power. Without wanting it, the girl becomes a sorceress, not yet guessing what danger awaits her.

At a Madurai police station, Vinoth—the son of powerful Chennai gangster Dhana—is brutally beaten by four policemen led by SI Raja and secretly dumped outside the city. The next day, he is found murdered. Blaming the officers, Dhana unleashes ruthless revenge on them and their families. As fear and suspicion close in, SI Raja races to uncover the real killer—before Dhana’s trap destroys everything. Who truly killed Vinoth? What was the motive? The shocking truth erupts in the climax.

Controversial New York filmmaker Brody Hawkins and his team launch a voyeuristic project aimed at using isolation and to push film subjects to their limit and face their inner demons, on camera. When tragedy strikes and the team begins to fray, examiners become the tested and their own ghosts begin to surface.

Film_title: It's nice to get lost // Fajnie się zgubić

Description: A family in crisis take a roadtrip to visit one of their own. Unless they can learn to communicate, the journey threatens to tear them even further apart.
A deadly serial killer flees jail and goes to Whitby, North Yorkshire, during the famous Whitby Goth Weekend.

The film tells the story of Ma Ran, a middle-aged man who joins a real-estate agency project to raise one million yuan for a bride price. Instead, he becomes entangled in a fraud scheme and is falsely accused of the crime. Through careful planning and determination, he ultimately clears his name, brings the scam ring to justice, and finds true love along the way.

Siva, an ambitious youth aspiring to be a police officer, wins Sivani's love and marries her, only for her to be abducted the very next day by a powerful minister intent on forcing her into marriage. With a dangerous criminal also hunting her, the story centers on Sivani's strength and whether Siva can rescue her from his enemies.
Three hundred years after the Battle of Penglai, Baili Tusu is revived and must face a new threat when the demon Chi You takes control of Ouyang Shaogong to endanger the three realms.

Harvest is a gripping 2026 psychological thriller short film that begins as a warm Friendsgiving celebration among close friends. What starts as a joyful evening filled with delicious food, laughter, and lighthearted secrets quickly spirals into tension and darkness when Maya (Alesia Daniele) introduces a mysterious card game that forces everyone to confront hidden truths. Blending elements of action and psychological thriller, Harvest masterfully explores escalating drama, mind games, and the dangerous power of secrets in an intimate setting. What begins as a cozy holiday hangout soon becomes a tense battle of wits where no one is quite who they seem. Directed by Emmanuel Jackson and Khadary Stephens, this sharp and twisty indie short delivers suspense, emotional intensity, and unexpected turns that will keep audiences on edge long after the final card is played.

Film_title: Honto ni Atta! Noroi no Video 114
Description: 114th entry in the popular "Honto ni Atta! Noroi no Video" film series.

Aman, a young man from a village in Kedah, is caught up in a human trafficking syndicate led by a cunning criminal who hides behind a legitimate business. His situation becomes even more complicated when Aman learns that his loved ones have also been victims. Hunted by the authorities and haunted by guilt, Aman is forced to make a big choice that will determine his future and the safety of his family.
Owners, players, managers come and go, but the fans are forever. The Bridge follows the fans of one of the world's most storied football clubs, Chelsea FC.

Film_title: Resistance101: Forging a New Movement for Palestine in Italy
Description: With little hope of the genocide in Gaza subsiding, dock workers in major Italian port cities have organized strikes and large demonstrations to halt arms shipments to Israel. These actions are a direct response to the refusal of international institutions and governments around the world to confront the carnage. Though the genocide continues, the dockworkers’ industrial disruption offer us a model of resistance. Will the Italian way spread to the imperial core — and can it end the genocide?

Film_title: Anna und ihr Untermieter - Volles Haus

Description: Two strangers uncover a hidden child trafficking and exploitation network operating in plain sight. As they risk everything to protect innocent lives, an unexpected bond grows between them. A gripping story of courage, compassion, and love born in the fight for justice.
A man withdraws to a remote cabin following a personal rupture. As isolation deepens, memory and desire begin to surface, blurring the boundary between what is remembered and what is real.

He Falls in Love With an Angel Who Appears in His Dreams. That Love Ends in Heartbreak. Yet The Same Emotions Continue in Real Life Without Changing a Single Frame. The Story Follows How the Hero, Carrying the Same Love in His Heart, Finds a Way to Reclaim the Angel He Lost in His Dream, This Time in Reality

In the future, Cheng Xuan, a genius scientist with a doctorate in physics, has devoted himself to researching black hole technology for many years, and finally invented a 'ring' that allows him to travel through time. Cheng Xuan excitedly showed his scientific research results to his girlfriend Weier, and the two used the 'ring' to explore time and space. But disaster strikes when Cheng Xuan becomes lost in time, and his creation may not be everything he believed it to be.

Aa Bata Aama is a heartfelt story set in a serene Nepali village, following a loving couple who are blessed with a son, Krishna, after years of hope and prayer. They raise him with deep care and big dreams, eventually making great sacrifices to send him abroad for better opportunities. As Krishna adapts to a new life, he becomes increasingly distant from his roots and family. Back home, his parents continue to cherish his memories and wait for his return. The film gently explores themes of love, sacrifice, ambition, and the emotional distance that can grow between family and dreams.

Five youngsters become addicted to a mysterious fantasy game that grants every wish instantly. As reality begins to blur, one girl suddenly disappears and is presumed dead. Realizing the game holds the truth, the others re-enter it to uncover its hidden rules. They discover every wish comes at a cost and must make a painful sacrifice to bring her back forever changed by the consequences of their desires.

Buried memories from his subconscious mind suddenly resurface. A triggering event turns his life upside down. From this turmoil is born a thrilling, suspenseful, and thought-provoking case - Case Number 73.

Don't Make Me Bless You is a gripping urban drama about Raine, a salon owner who falls for Dre, a charming ex-con rebuilding his life after prison. a dangerous cycle of control and violence, forcing Raine to confront the truth about love.
A Tet movie by Duy Khánh.
Prof. Franco Fossi thinks he can get away with drugs, shady business, and blackmailing students. He has no idea a brutal reality check is coming.

An emotional story centered on a group of friends who embark on a trip to Cox's Bazar, where their shared experiences and deep conversations highlight the complexities of their interpersonal relationships. At the heart of the narrative is Ayan, whose struggle with past losses, feelings of loneliness, and deep connection to his grandmother create an poignant atmosphere throughout the journey. The story explores themes of personal growth, the pain of letting go, and the evolving nature of human bonds, capturing both the joy of friendship and the bittersweet reality of how lives and relationships can transform over time.

Film_title: If You Go Towards It for a Long Time
Description: The movie is based on Zakhar Prilepin's autobiographical novella "The Forest". The story focuses on the father and son who spend every summer in the village of Isttsy, where they raft down the local Istya River. They have done so for several years, but this time things go astray: a harmless adventure turns into a real disaster. Much later the grown-up son remembers his father through the lens of the past years.
A maladjusted cart pusher at a dying grocery store falls for an underage cashier during a heat wave in the New Jersey suburbs.

Film_title: Jason Byrne - Head in the Clouds
Description: Jason Byrne's "Head in the Clouds" is a live stand-up comedy tour spanning 2025–2026, featuring his trademark high-energy, chaotic, and observational comedy,
Ritwik, struggling with corporate pressure and personal grief, travels to a place cherished by his late mother. He meets Ira, a spirited traveler navigating a restrictive, complicated relationship.
The film brings together a group of writers and performers to satirize American democracy and politics through roughly a dozen original songs in the style of Mel Brooks

Film_title: Élodie Poux fait son cinéma à Montreux

Description: The movie follows professional assassin Eren Creed as he undertakes his life's biggest contract to kill the CEO of a big evil faceless corporation. Can this anti-hero complete this impossible goal?
A true crime documentary crew explores a pharmacologist killer's old hideout, only to realize he may still be there with them.

Film_title: François Pirette : Pro-Fête en son pays
Nintama Rantarou 16th Musical: Ninja Training at Tasogaredoki!
Description: The 16th Nintama Rantarou Musical installment.
This 2024 live concert is the final concert featuring the original Godsmack lineup and features a set list consisting of some of their greatest hits and the legendary Battle of The Drums.

Ten-year-old Great Demon is a whirlwind of mischief and imagination, leaving chaos and laughter in his wake. But beneath his wild antics lies a quiet loneliness. One ordinary day, a strange new friend named Ke appears out of nowhere, turning Great Demon’s world upside down. For the first time, he feels seen. For the first time, he belongs.

Ale is about to get married. His two best friends, Tom and Zenone, arrive at the ceremony and, prompted by Sara, a curious bridesmaid, begin to tell the story of what was supposed to be the perfect bachelor weekend. But when Ale shows up with his sarcastic fifteen-year-old sister Viola, everything changes. No luxury hotel, no excess: just camping tents, mountain trails, and a lot of (emotional) endurance. Alternating between present and flashback, between jokes and internal breakdowns, the protagonists discover that growing up is scary, but doing it together might just make it easier.
An exploration of what it is to be lost in today’s world and how to be okay with where you are.

On the night before the 1975 Soum Naadam, Balgaa, a young man, rides a dangerous racehorse to protect his beloved daughter, Tsevelmaa, and is injured and remains ill for life. Twenty years later, the young man is raising Tsoomoo alone, but he is in danger of being separated from his son. Amidst past secrets, old friendships, and conflicts of interest, Balgaa fights to keep his son. Finally, the truth is revealed, and the moment comes when the son's fate is decided between the heart of a mother and the great love of a father. There is light within every person.

Film_title: Choral Music, from Dutilleux to Poulenc Featuring Birds on a Wire and the Théâtre de Chaillot
Description: The Maîtrise de Radio takes us on a journey through three hundred years of choral music. From Bach to Jean-Benoît Dunkel, including a world premiere by Fabien Waksman, this richly varied concert is punctuated by the dance-infused collaboration of the Théâtre de Chaillot

A cozy, intimate performance in the round of Chris Lanzon's album 'You're Missing The Best Part', plus a debut extra. Captured live in front of an audience in Sydney's Eveleigh Hotel on the 26th of March, 2026.

This drama portrays a unique love story where, even in the age of technology, a deep connection is formed through handwritten letters. A simple P.O. Box number—144—becomes the bridge that brings two strangers together, intertwining their lives in an unexpected and heartfelt way.
The biblical character Moses returns to modern times (now) and heals the world with his staff.

Director: Dmitry Belosokhov, Ruslan Rimovich et al
Description: The Artek International Children's Center has always been a land of sunshine and loud laughter, but these camps will be special. While an obsessed astronomy professor scours the surrounding area in search of a fallen meteorite for long-awaited glory, inexplicable things begin to happen at the camp. One by one, the most active children turn into "shadows": they lose interest in games, friends, and life, sinking into a frightening apathy. A group of teenagers uncovers an incredible truth: aliens are lurking within the camp, literally draining the children of their joy and happiest memories.
Studios: Ministry of Education of the Russian Federation

Film_title: We need to speak about living room
Description: Shot at the Labre House in Utrecht, the film brings together a cast of participants to enact experiences and conflicts of shared living within a community housing context, as well as the external pressures that threaten such forms of collective life. The work is interwoven with archival material from histories of collective housing and contemporary housing struggles, and is presented within architectural installations that follow the historic structures of both Casco’s building and Kunsthuis Syb.

At the Imagerie d’Épinal, the lifeless body of the museum’s artistic director is found trapped in a lithographic press, his hands severed and his tongue torn out. The killer has placed an Épinal print from a triptych—the centerpiece of the exhibition currently on display at the Imagerie museum—on top of the body. The investigation is entrusted to Captain Alice Fournier and Commander Émile Cabat. While Alice, a native of Épinal, knows the Imagerie inside and out—her father ran it—Émile, who has transferred from the customs office in Pointe-à-Pitre to be closer to his daughter, will have to get used to local customs and traditions. Between the two of them, the chemistry is electric. But they’ll have to set aside their differences if they want to solve this case.

Film_title: TYPEなに？ 性格診断で人生決めちゃいます

Description: Pain Re-synthesised is a meditation on the subjective nature of pain. Exploring the disorienting, debilitating nature of pain, while also reflecting on its potential to generate something new – to create texture, detail, temporal dimensions, divinity and beauty that didn’t exist before. A process of re-synthesis takes place as a groan is broken up, warped, re-pitched and transformed again and again through SPEAR – a spectral analysis program that visualises sound frequencies as fragmented grey lines.

Asia are back and roaring in their new, exhilarating line-up! Recorded live on the first of three unforgettable nights at Trading Boundaries in Sussex, in April 2025, this release captures the band performing their iconic 1982 debut album ASIA in full, along with a selection of their greatest hits. Featuring Geoff Downes (keys), Virgil Donati (drums – ex-Planet X), John Mitchell (guitars – Arena, It Bites etc.) and the astonishing Harry Whitley (on bass and vocals), this fresh incarnation of Asia brings both reverence for the classics and a thrilling new energy to the stage. The setlist includes fan favorites like Heat of the Moment, Only Time Will Tell, Sole Survivor, One Step Closer and Time Again, alongside video-era and bonus tracks such as Ride Easy, Video Killed the Radio Star, The Heat Goes On and Daylight (video exclusive).

Holding Shards is a performance to camera video work. It was filmed in a burnt, regrowing woodland in Kent; a desecrated church in Swansea; and a stream in the Gower Peninsula. The work builds on a live performance made in the village of Walsingham, Norfolk (Messenger’s Lament) which examined that place’s history of image-breaking and the pilgrimage of childless believers. The protagonist of both works is a smashed stained-glass saint, who laments unanswered prayer.
The Cyrus the Great Diamond is stolen from an excavation site in Iran and falls into the hands of a Russian boy vacationing at the seaside with his family.

Film_title: Future Train: To you who don't know "that day"
Description: The story centers around a three-generation family and the memories of Hiroshima between 1975 and 2025. Back in 1975, Hiroshima is slowly rebuilding itself after the atomic building. There, lives Ogaki Sachie, a mother who survived the postwar era and single-handedly raise her two daughters while operating a local coffee house. Half a century later, in present-day Hiroshima, Sachie's granddaughter, Kuramochi Yuki, is now an employee at a local TV station and is assigned to produce a special program. She decides to talk to grandmother who brings up the untold past of Hiroshima for the first time.
A jobless graduate torn between love, friendship, and responsibility sets out for a new life abroad, but a shocking tragedy brings him back home where he finds purpose, truth, and redemption.
A Film By Henok Dinku
A Film By Mahsa Ahmadzadeh
A Film By Sorrosh Zarini

A married woman's secret affair spirals out of control when her brother in law traps everyone inside the house to expose the truth. As tensions rise, a violent accident forces everyone to question loyalty, love, and who the real victim is.

Solly Bertone, whose real name is Solange Berton, is ending her 32-year career as a senior flight attendant on Hexagone Air flights. After five years of enduring domestic flights with the low-cost subsidiary, she is hoping for one last prestigious trip. But during her final briefing at Roissy, she discovers that she has been assigned to a flight to Bergerac, a destination that infuriates her.

Film_title: Barely Alive Presents: Overdrive – Brostep Mix
Description: A high-energy live brostep mix performed by Barely Alive, combining electronic music performance with cinematic lighting, lasers and club-oriented visual design.
Yunmeng Romance , Yunmeng Fate

Film_title: Crimea: The War Before the War. Part 1
Description: Russia seized Crimea in February–March 2014, shortly after the EuroMaidan Revolution, at a time when Ukrainian President Viktor Yanukovych had fled the country and the new authorities were just beginning to govern. Many believe that Russian President Vladimir Putin took advantage of the moment and annexed the peninsula. But when did Russia actually first attempt to seize Crimea? And why, long before the annexation — while Russian leaders publicly declared friendship with Ukraine and recognized its territorial integrity — were Russian flags already flying in Crimean cities, Russian warships present, festivals celebrating the Russian language held, and Russia's Empress Catherine glorified across the peninsula? All the while, leading Russian politicians were calling on Crimeans to embrace separatism on television.

Film_title: Orquestra à Base de Sopro Convida Grupo Fato
Description: A historic and unprecedented encounter. OABS invited Grupo FATO to the Guairinha stage to celebrate its 30-year trajectory. Recognized for its collaborations with prominent poets and composers, Grupo FATO is a benchmark in the fusion of diverse musical elements. This encounter, laden with symbolism, recalls the creation of the Curitiba Conservatory of Popular Music and the Music Workshops, institutions that shaped the trajectories of these two groups, "born" at the same time.

Film_title: Les Folies Gruss, 50 ans à Paris
Description: Stephan Gruss is proud to unveil a show co-written with author and composer Grégory Garell, in an original setting designed by Grégory Antoine. Together, they showcase the talents of 25 artists, 50 horses from the cavalry, the Folies Gruss orchestra, and the performances of two young singers: Candice Parise and Xavier Ducrocq. For Louise, a sparkling young singer, joining the Folies Gruss troupe is a childhood dream. Recorded on March 29, 2025, in Paris's 16th arrondissement.

Texas Rhapsody is a powerful, inspiring film set against the oil fields and open skies of West Texas. Inspired by 3 true stories, it follows lives shaped by immigration, grit, and hope - where music becomes shared language. Written and produced by Sam Pfiester and directed by Taylor Stanley, the film features non-actors playing themselves, striking landscapes, and an unflinching look at humanity.
In a harsh, lawless world where trust is rare and survival comes at a cost.

Studios: 山西菲尔幕文化传媒有限公司

Film_title: Vivaldi e Bach con Rinaldo Alessandrini
Description: The Orchestra and Choir of the Accademia Nazionale di Santa Cecilia, conducted by Rinaldo Alessandrini, will perform sacred works by Vivaldi and Bach. The program includes the *Dixit Dominus*, the *Concerto di San Lorenzo*, and the *Magnificat*, featuring a distinguished vocal ensemble.

Film_title: The Dan Cooper Chronicles: A Daredevil’s Leap, Fall and Subsequent Case
Description: On November 24th, 1971, a man traveling under the pseudonym of Dan Cooper hijacked a Boeing 727, demanding a $200,000 ransom, before fleeing by parachute somewhere between Seattle and Reno. The incident remains the only unsolved skyjacking to this date.
Thomas Kitt returns, this time a fully fledged MI6 agent.
When 11-year-old Mila finds her demented grandmother Elise's old violin, she begins to play - hoping to awaken a memory in her.

Two families reunite for a lavish Yoruba wedding after a past scandal nearly tore them apart. As Mary and Jide prepare to marry, unresolved tensions, family pressure, and reputation fears threaten their union. Meanwhile, new parents Dapo and Tani battle constant clashes between their feuding mothers. Amid tradition, church politics, and romantic distractions, both couples must choose honesty and commitment before the celebration unravels.

Film_title: The Marine Spirit: A Tale Of The Mami Wata
Description: The Marine Spirit is based on factual events as told through the eyes of a Nigerian couple. When the young couple find themselves haunted by the spirit of the Mami Wata – an ancient African water deity; they discover the power of faith and prayers.
shot with Sony DCR-TRV460
A lonely man experiments with his life decisions with the help of a non-human entity, only to be pushed deeper into isolation.

Wrongfully accused, Alexander Obregón spent years in prison for a crime he didn't commit, where poetry became his only form of resistance. After regaining his freedom, he returns to a world that still judges him, determined to prove his innocence and uncover who is behind his conviction. Facing a system that refuses to listen and bearing the scars of his past, he embarks on a quest marked by pain and a thirst for justice. Because even in the midst of silence, the truth can find a way to surface and change everything.

Condemned to silence on an isolated farm under her husband's control, a woman sees the cage that imprisons her own soul reflected in the pens of the animals. An unexpected act of cruelty from her husband awakens a suppressed darkness within her, and she is no longer alone. The dinner table, set in the darkness of night, becomes the stage for a man's crumbling power and the silent alliance of two women.

Hetty Helsmoortel returns with a brand-new show, but this time more than just the science news has changed. In 2025, Hetty became a mother again, and that experience has given her a new perspective on the world, even as a scientist.

The story follows two friends, aspiring businessmen, trying to confirm a business deal with a strong and scary gangster and his wife. As everything goes terribly wrong, the two start fighting, and go their separate ways.

An ocean separates them, the Atlantic. A granddaughter sets out to trace her grandfather's footsteps. She saw him often, but they never really met. At 91, Réal Arsenault has a life worth telling. A painter who left his mark on the history of contemporary art in Quebec, he was also very active in politics, working alongside supporters of a free and independent Quebec. This film will pay tribute to his life and his art, but it will also question what we leave behind on Earth, the legacy we pass on to our children and grandchildren, and the importance of communication within a family.
A man struggles to write.
A look behind the scenes at the last remaining Shaker village.

A New Fighter joins the arena, powered by a tiny dog creature, a new alpha, Alpha P. Bear. An unlikely duo forms to take down this evil force. A long with Alpha Buck and Alpha Bear gaining the insane power to throw elite punches.

Film_title: メガネはこうでなくっちゃ 時東ぁみ Aircontrol
Description: 2026 release
Someone who wants to be a hero...He enters a 100-year-old castle where kings lived in search of money...whether he takes the money or not is the story...a story that takes place one night...

Director: Shivum Saha, Vishruth Rao et al
Description: An alien drops by Earth, grabs a bite, and leaves without even leaving a tip.

Cast: Orchestre National des Pays de la Loire

Composers: Orchestre National des Pays de la Loire

Description: The closing concert of La Folle Journée de Nantes, galvanized by the ebb and flow of the Volga, Mississippi, and Moldau rivers. The program features works by Maria Bach, Franz Schubert, Clara Schumann, Robert Schumann, Richard Wagner, and Bedrich Smetana.

Film_title: Montreux Fashion Show by Nino Arial

Description: Looks back onto the arrival of home computers like the Atari ST and Commodore, that brought the creative process into people’s homes. Films and music originated outside of the traditional studio system, without cameras or musical instruments, but through generative software.
Afilm by Tesfatsion Mekuria

Film_title: Saburo Teshigawara, Sayaka Shoji, and Rihoko Sato @ Château de Champlâtreux - Sur Mesure
Description: The renowned Japanese choreographer Saburo Teshigawara takes over the Château de Champlâtreux for *Sur Mesure*. He has invited dancer Rihoko Sato and violinist Sayaka Shoji to join him in this performance.

Film_title: Action Stage: Helios Rising Heroes -THE EAST-
Description: After numerous tryouts (selection tests), rookie Gray finally becomes a "hero" as part of HELIOS' 13th generation. After being assigned to the East Sector, he spends his days receiving extremely strict instruction from his mentor, Asch. Despite encouragement from fellow rookie Billy and his mentor, Jay, Gray is beginning to lose confidence in himself as a "hero." Meanwhile, the chaos caused by Eclipse is becoming increasingly extreme. Furthermore, the increasing number of Zeros is putting HELIOS on high alert. Amidst all this, an incident occurs that pits them against Eclipse, and Gray, Asch, and the others are unable to work together as a team, forcing them into a difficult battle. But then, something strange happens to Gray, and he reveals a personality that is the complete opposite of his usual self...

Film_title: Unser Hof mit Cheyenne und Nino - Neue Stallgeschichten
Description: This final movie concludes the serie "Unser Hof – Mit Cheyenne und Nino". It offers viewers an intimate look into the daily life of Cheyenne Ochsenknecht (daughter of German actor Uwe Ochsenknecht) and her husband, farmer Nino Sifkovits, as they run their farm, the Chianinahof, in Dobl, Styria, Austria.

Timothee and Hope reunite after years apart under mysterious circumstances. As the key to the future, they must race against time to prevent a radical organization, led by Agent 5010 and his counterparts, from exploiting their special abilities.
An upcoming Bollywood movie.

The story of the South African Band Ladysmith Black Mambazo who became worldwide sensations after powering Paul Simon's landmark and massively successful Graceland Album. The film takes us from roots in apartheid to winning 5 Grammys. We talk with Oprah Winfrey, Dolly Parton and others who work with them, and get an insightful, surprising look inside the Graceland Sessions at Abbey Road Studios.

A woman’s disappearance leads a simple man into the dark underbelly of the medical world. When Kajal vanishes after returning to the city, Ishwar’s search pulls him into a massive hospital where he uncovers brutal scams and the ruthless exploitation of patients. What begins as a personal quest turns into a dangerous battle against a powerful, corrupt healthcare system — and a fight to save both Kajal and countless innocent lives.
An aspiring filmmaker's retreat turns deadly as a killer murders her loved ones, forcing her to face a dark truth within her own script.

Film_title: The Divine Comedy @ Cirque Royal, Brussels
Description: The Divine Comedy bring all the suave elegance and humour of their orchestral pop to the Cirque Royal in Brussels. With frontman Neil Hannon at the top of his game, they introduce us to their thirteenth album: Rainy Sunday Afternoon.
Stranded at a remote cabin, a grieving family faces a relentless bear that tests their shelter and forces a final stand.

When his platoon is ambushed during WWII, an American medic escapes into the nearby forest, relentlessly pursued by the enemy. While evading capture, he encounters an unbelievable creature, not knowing if it's friend or foe. It will take everything he has to survive as new alliances will be formed and loyalties will be tested.

Director: Vivienne Miekle, Harper Miekle et al
Description: A coming of age movie created by 3 teenage girls. Shot over 2 minutes in a grass field.
A cabin getaway turns deadly when a rogue bear stalks five college friends, forcing the survivors to flee through the forest at night with a ranger guiding them.
A generation of lesbians who’ve had to rely on chosen family reflect on the work their community has done to age in place on the North Fork of Long Island.

IRON MAIDEN: BURNING AMBITION explores how Iron Maiden has helped shape a cultural movement, challenging conventional views of rock music and heavy metal’s broader impact on society and culture. Featuring interviews with the band and contributors such as Javier Bardem, Lars Ulrich, and Chuck D, this electrifying film offers an intimate look at their uncompromising vision and unwavering connection with their global army of fans.
Guru Aama, a compassionate and dedicated teacher, fate and career are in trouble when one of her student, Muna falls into drug addiction.

Film_title: Carl Craig B2B Seth Troxler @ Nuits Sonores 2026
Description: Lyon’s Nuit Sonores festival welcomes two living legends of Detroit techno to the party: Carl Craig, a towering figure in electronic music since the 1980s and Seth Troxler, one of the world’s most popular DJs according to Resident Advisor.

Xiao Mo, a philosophy student, volunteered at a funeral assistance center to search for the meaning of life and death. Unexpectedly, his mentor passed away under strange circumstances. It is said that there is an ancient well in a small village said to have the power to bring the dead back to life. Believing in this legend, Xiao Mo's mentor, Chen Hui, died trying to revive his own son. Thus, Xiao Mo, along with a mysterious funeral arranger known as Old Man Bai, set out to investigate the village. Old Man Bai uses scientific methods to uncover the truth behind the bodies in the well, the girl's hanging, and the creatures lurking in the thick fog—revealing that everything was deliberately orchestrated by humans. It is a truly intriguing film.

Soon after getting cast as the lead of a surrealist production, Abhimanyu gets suspended in his last semester of university: throwing his career prospects, personal relationships and senseless film into jeopardy.
Police investigate Dream Harvester, a political faction opposing the digitization of consciousness.

Roy and Tina enjoy a picture-perfect life together-until it begins to unravel into an unsettling loop of twists and deception. As the boundaries of their reality shift, the ultimate truth proves to be more chilling than they ever imagined.

Wars can begin with a single shot. Peace is a task for generations. On a journey around the world, the film explores examples of how peace emerges and what it takes to preserve it in the long term, and to foster understanding, reconciliation, and coexistence.

The prophet Jonah chooses to disobey Jehovah's command to preach judgment upon the Assyrian city of Nineveh; but through the dramatic events that follow, he discovers the true meaning of courage and mercy.

Jack Taylor is a devoted single father and a man on the verge of the biggest promotion of his career. But when his 16-year-old daughter Olivia begins to spiral after the loss of her mother, Jack faces an impossible decision: secure their financial future, or be the present, loving father she desperately needs right now.

"Legend of Ling Jing" is inspired by the tale of the White Snake, reimagining Bai Su’s past and present lives. In her previous life, she was the adopted daughter of a general, separated in life and death from her childhood sweetheart due to the constraints of society. In this life, she is reborn in a demon’s body, wandering the mortal world with her companion Jing Gu. By chance, she meets and falls in love with Xu Xuan, the son of someone from her past. As fate cycles anew and old grudges resurface, what ending awaits this forbidden love that transcends the boundaries between human and demon?
An unscripted reality competition pits a group of strangers and peers against one another online in an unpredictable game of social politics for the charities of their choice.

Karthi falls in love with a village girl named Pechi,and brings her to Chennai. Karthi suspects Pechi of having illicit relationship with his friends. Pechi does not like Karhik"s suspecting character,as a result she returns to her village and marries Surender.

Maa Jaye is a powerful Punjabi film that revolves around the deep bond of brotherhood. It tells the story of brothers bound by love, loyalty, and shared struggles, as they face life's challenges together. Rooted in emotions and family values, the film highlights sacrifice, responsibility, and the strength that comes from standing by one another through every test of time.

In rural Rajasthan, a crime investigation exposes how black magic and superstition are weaponised to manipulate and exploit the vulnerable. As the case unfolds, the truth behind the so-called supernatural reveals a dangerous nexus of fear, fraud, and human greed.

Film_title: Suara dari Sudut Kelas: Sayap Garuda
Description: Allana, a student who transfers to Sukma Middle School with her father, Mr. Wahyu, begins to face new dynamics. At school, she faces bullying from several students, including Kenzi, a quiet student who participates in the pencak silat extracurricular and excels at it. Allana and Kenzi learn many life lessons from pencak silat, that true strength does not come from physical strength, but from the heart that wants to protect and continue to advance in defending the truth.

Film_title: Jan Van Eyken & Pascal Braeckman, Backstage
Postcode Loterij In de Ring   seizoen 1

Description: After winning a landmark trial, lawyer Macbeth is predicted to have a glorious future. Manipulated by his mistress Marilyn, he will lose himself in his hunger for power, until he reaches a tragic point of no return.

This independent documentary explores Bangkok’s vibrant shibari subculture through the voices of the community itself. Practitioners speak directly to camera, sharing their personal journeys—what drew them to rope, what sustains their practice, and how shibari shapes their inner lives.
A crime thriller story set in Serbia.

A mysterious camera discovered outside an abandoned building in New Zealand is handed over to police after it’s found containing disturbing footage. Weeks later, the video leaks online, revealing a terrifying ritual performed by two friends attempting to bring someone back from the dead. As the footage spreads across the internet, viewers begin questioning whether what they witnessed was a hoax… or something far more real.

Film_title: Joelma - Isso É Calypso Tour Brazil: Live in Brasília
Description: The project Joelma - Isso é Calypso Tour Brasil: Ao Vivo em Brasília was a DVD recorded at Granja do Torto on October 18, 2025. The high-level recording featured a 58-meter stage and guest appearances by Wanderley Andrade and Vingadores do Brega, with the audiovisual release scheduled for March 2026.
Series on Ultra about a young girl that starts at a new school and tells a lie that ends up getting her in trouble.

After a harsh breakup, a soul-crushing job, and the pain of watching her ex move on with someone new, Cristina reaches a breaking point. What starts as a fleeting intrusive thought turns into a wild, reckless plan to erase him from her life — a choice that will send her down a path with no way back.

"Colleagues who started at the same time as you" - something that seems special but is actually known by many people. A bond that is neither friendship nor romantic love, but trust. A coming-of-age work movie set in Fukuoka, filled with tears, hardships, and conflicts as rookie office workers!

Late Qing era. Reporter Dai Xue uncovers a ring using zombies to traffic young girls. The mastermind is the Seventh Princess, a Ming descendant raising funds to restore her fallen dynasty. She turns General Habu into a zombie weapon. After the plot is exposed, she unleashes the vampire William. Habu regains his mind and fights back. At the critical moment, senior brother Shi Gandang arrives, and together they bring down the princess and William.

Divorcing couple Rishab and Lakshmi meet counselor Dr. Gangadevi, who recounts a film about Shantanu and heiress Janvi — on hearing that story the couple finds about an estranged person and the get to know about the relationship between them.

With Baba (Akihiko Kuwata) acting as Kyowakai chairman and Sakota (Hideo Nakano) leading the Marugami-kai, both groups begin a new chapter. Kyowakai finalizes long-delayed executive appointments: Hayashida (Ehara Shu) replaces the retired Nakajima as Shikoku block leader, while Hirakawa (Hitomi Matsuda) becomes Tohoku block leader by Baba’s nomination, easing concerns from Himuro (Yasukaze Motomiya), Tamura (Yoshiyuki Yamaguchi), and Ueki (Daisuke Nagakura). While drinking in Kobe, Baba drunkenly orders Himuro and others to “crush Marugami,” and the remark quickly spreads to Marugami and investigators. Baba then orders a manhunt, but Hirakawa objects and questions why the “Adachi-kai,” a group of delinquent gangs that fled Kyowakai’s control and formed in Tohoku, had been ignored. After being calmed by Himuro, Hirakawa heads to Tohoku to handle the group himself—setting the stage for new tensions involving Baba, Hirakawa, and the Adachi-kai.

Six college friends set off on a weekend getaway into the heart of a sprawling forest, full of laughter, music, and playful adventures. But their carefree joy takes a sudden turn when they wander into a forbidden part of the forest, a zone where the air feels different, the shadows deeper, and an unseen force begins to stir.

Set in 18th-century Italy, Stiletto follows Marco, a young castrato singer navigating the opulent yet perilous world of Venetian opera. His life changes when he meets Gioia; confident, strong willed...and supremely talented. But despite her musical gifts, as a black woman in a racist and misogynist society, there’s no chance for her to fulfil her dreams. Marco recognises her talent and, sensing that they are both outsiders as well as sharing a love for music, they fall in love. When a murder shatters their world, Marco must confront his past to save her. A sweeping tale of ambition, love, sacrifice, and resilience, Stiletto brings an opulent, rarely explored slice of musical history to the stage.
The Robinsons gather for a quintessential British summer BBQ

Based on the true story of Luo Shengjiao — one of “100 Touching Chinese Figures” since the founding of the PRC. During the Korean War, Luo, a company clerk, and his fellow volunteers fought fierce battles, endured extreme shortages, and braved brutal cold.

The Devil in a Sundress is a sharp, seductive thriller about the most dangerous lie, the one that looks like love. Because evil doesn't announce itself with horns and fire. It shows up soft-spoken, sun-kissed, and completely convincing.

Filming was completed in 2025, and in 2026 the film was edited and finalized by Yukio Hiruma based on the existing footage, as well as remaining storyboards and written materials. This short film was created around the filmmaker’s intuition and premonition, centered on the question: “What is the difference between sleep without the memory of dreams and death? Aren’t they essentially the same?” One of its themes is the nature of 8mm film as a “material that allows light to pass through it.

Kintsugi (金継) is a Japanese practice of repairing broken pottery with gold. The breaks and repairs are thus made visible, displayed rather than hidden. Human relationships aren't like pottery; perhaps they're more complex than simply repairing a plate. However, there's a certain parallel between our reunion and this ancient technique. Undoubtedly, there are wounds that were exposed by the distance that separated us for over a month. This isn't something to be ignored or hidden. However, that doesn't mean these emotional wounds can't be repaired. On the contrary, they become the foundation upon which we can build a strong bond. And that's what I want; I want to reclaim what was taken from us, our relationship. Ana Martes, I love you like I've never loved anyone before.

Filmed during DC's 2025 military occupation, ZAIRE explores the quarantine distance that united two souls who longed for human comfort beyond closed doors. Starring Carmen Banks and introducing Benji. Created by Iman DuPree.

Moscow banker Denis receives a mysterious call from his old friend Charles, an employee of the Unclaimed Deposits Department at the world's oldest bank, Monte dei Paschi di Siena, where an unclaimed 18th-century deposit of 20,000 gold louis d'or, made by the Maltese knight Blaise Marie de Aydi, was discovered. Today, this sum is worth over 10 million euros, and according to the will, the heirs of the princes Cherkassky can receive it. Denis and Charles decide to find the descendants and receive two million euros for their services, but soon discover they are not the only ones hunting for this deposit.
To Be Added soon

A young woman sits in a church, alone and guilty, or so she thought. Beginning with the unraveling and recounting from when this guilt began, she descends into a spiritual psychosis. Russians, Victor Hugo, God, her mother, and a past mania flit in and out of her consciousness. A film which treads in the murky waters of our inner worlds-- being unable to discriminate between the real and the imagined, the sane and the psychotic.

A Body of Objects is a single channel video piece cataloguing handmade instruments and found non-musical sound objects. By weaving together disparate sounds created by each instrument and sound object, A Body of Objects exalts the objecthood of these invented instruments and found items while disrupting ideas of linear listening. Each object has its own agency. Player and instrument work together to create a soundscape that invites listeners to think about sound and object as an encounter as opposed to the sequence they see; the instrument is played but as the video unfolds, it is increasingly difficult to place the action to the sound. The sound is mediated through the listeners’ perception and bodily attention, creating a unique subjective sonic experience that resists the hierarchy of linear compositions placed upon sound and engages in dialectical listening.

Shanti, known as Promoter Boudi, plans to build an old-age home and orphanage on a prime plot, but a ruthless developer wants it for a shopping mall. As past secrets resurface, a battle begins between compassion and greed.

Film_title: 「呪いをかけて、まぼろしをといて。」 at 日本武道館
Description: ano has released a video recording of his first-ever performance at the Nippon Budokan. This video captures the highly successful "Curse and Break the Illusion" concert, held on September 3, 2025, which captivated approximately 12,000 spectators. The release also includes a documentary chronicling ano's journey to the Budokan and his performance on the day itself, making it a must-have for fans.
Follows a martial artist as she accelerates her plans when things go wrong for her and her daughter. Chie must compete in a martial arts tournament known as Ragnarok

Parnitha, one of Greece’s most important ecosystems, now stands at the center of major corporate investment plans. The national forest closest to a European capital is gradually being pushed down a path of systematic degradation, with the threat of destruction now clearly visible. Who ultimately benefits when even the last fir tree is lost?
A Film by Bereket Tesfaye

After cultivating for a thousand years, the Cold Soul Spider, Zhu'er, was enlightened by Buddha and transformed into human form, descending to the mortal realm as a demon hunter. She joins forces with Ganlu, Zhicao, and Changfeng to vanquish demons and protect the righteous path. Zhu'er is deeply in love with Ganlu, but the incompatibility of their human and demonic paths plunges her into suffering. The sect leader, Wuxu, is consumed by demonic power and attempts to seize his cultivation. To save everyone, Zhu'er sacrifices three thousand years of cultivation to destroy the demon, ultimately realizing that her true love lies with Zhicao.

A man relapses on crystal meth behind his husband's back and discovers the grim cost of throwing away his sobriety. Part I of a series exploring the filmmaker's experiences with active addiction while in a committed relationship.

Cast: Coro I Musici del Gran Principe
Description: The first modern-day world premiere of Lully's last ballet-comedy.
Studios: Edunova - University of Modena and Reggio Emilia

Film_title: SNOS-056り広げられる、お酒の勢いで一線を超えてしまった男女のふしだらな土日。生々しくて普通だけど一番エロいSEX

Description: Stella Sterling is a reporter at The Star Newspaper. She is also Starlight City’s superheroine, Cosmic Girl. Stella Sterling is working at her office when she receives an alert about Dr. Havoc’s whereabouts. The evil scientist has a lab in Starlight City. Cosmic Girl is ready to bring him to justice. However, Dr. Havoc has created a new device. It is the Virtue Warp Ray. It corrupts a person’s virtue. Dr. Havoc blasts Cosmic Girl with the Virtue Warp Ray! The corruption from the Virtue Warp Ray interferes with Cosmic Girl’s duties. The superheroine attempts to arrest a tech thief. The corruption leads to public humiliation.

Film_title: Les plus grands magiciens du monde - Les Mandrakes d'Or 2025

Description: After her brother is murdered, Jade Carter uncovers a secret list linking powerful elites to a deadly conspiracy. As corrupt forces close in, she must outsmart both criminals and law enforcement to expose the truth - and survive long enough to get revenge.

Occurring within an enclosed space and shot on DV (digital video) tape, Can You Hear Me? follows Louna and other female sex workers, who, despite speaking different languages, share an innate, psychic connection.
A man battling cancer chooses between strength and rest, help and independence.
What happens when a couple before divorce is still living under the same roof and then their mothers join?!

Film_title: 性欲二股道 色々やっちゃいます
Description: Shigeru, who runs a guesthouse inherited from his parents, decides to propose to his long-distance girlfriend, Tsuruko. However, Shigeru's sister, Masami, who had been out of contact for a long time, suddenly returns to their hometown…

Film_title: Marc Ribot Quartet @ Jazz sous les Pommiers 2026
Description: Marc Ribot rarely performs in Europe. His appearance at Jazz sous les Pommiers is therefore a real treat, especially since the guitarist is performing here with his quartet to introduce us to the album *Hurry Red Telephone*.

Adam is the leading candidate to govern his country. There are only a few days left before the elections, and the tension is mounting. Adam decides to spend those days alone in a hotel, but this will not happen due to a visit from his colleagues.

Film_title: Bungo and Alchemist The Stage - Concerto of Saver
Description: Stage adaptation of the game Bungo to Alchemist.

A heartfelt family drama about returning to ancestral village and rediscovering the meaning of home through reconnection with family and the mountains, the story shows how embracing one’s roots can heal relationships and bring true clarity in life.

The core of this work is the "atypical awakening" of ordinary people at the bottom of society during the turbulent Republican era. Set within the enclosed, everyday world of a crowded courtyard, characters like Xu Tian, Tian Dan, and Ba Gu transform from enduring humiliation just to survive to actively turning against oppression for their family and country.\NCentered on themes of "streetwise ingenuity resisting power" and "simple kindness concealing a greater righteousness," it tells the story of a desperate counterattack by society’s underdogs.
Beck's performance at the end of the PinkPop Festival in Landgraaf, Netherlands on May 19, 1997.
A beautiful blend of romance and emotion.

Film_title: La fête de la chanson française - 20 ans d'émotions

Description: Ultrawoman - Captive and awaiting delivery to an unknown villain, while the exasperated Victor Vandal and manic Mirror keep her powers in check. When Mirror finds out that Ultrawoman and Victor used to be an item, jealousy and tempers flare, leading to a desperate escape attempt. Fortunately, Ultrawoman has more than one weakness to subdue her with, and the villainous pair will do ‘anything’ to keep her in bondage. Even if that means having a good time. What a job.

The protagonist works at a warehouse with his mentor and friend. Very much unlike each other, they nevertheless keep together, learning each other's past. Having lost his family, the protagonist feels more affinity with his colleagues. Later he meets a girl and senses the birth of a new life.

Dear Family is a family-centered Bangladeshi Eid natok that explores the emotional dynamics, misunderstandings, and hidden bonds within a modern household. The story typically revolves around generational gaps, unspoken expectations, and the struggle to maintain unity in a changing social context.

Film_title: You ain't nothing but a hand, dog
Me Robo Al Patron Y El Negocio Tambien
Cast: Jose Cisneros El Chepon de Jalisco
Description: Reina, a strong and determined woman, discovers that her husband Ramiro and her best friend Angela have betrayed her. Not only are they involved in a secret relationship, but they are also planning to take control of the business she helped build from nothing. After a violent confrontation, Reina believes she has ended their threat and walks away from her past. However, she soon learns that both are still alive and expanding their power in an attempt to dominate the territory. Forced to return, Reina enters a ruthless conflict where pride, power, and revenge collide. In a world where betrayal has lasting consequences, Reina must confront her past and prove that pain can be transformed into strength.
A low budget musical comedy created to present Macedonian folk songs.

Film_title: Souad Massi, ALA.NI, and Gildaa @ Les Concerts Volants
Description: Souad Massi’s fiery energy, ALA.NI’s sensuality, and Gildaa’s eccentricity: Les Concerts Volants presents an all-female lineup on the stage of Cabaret Sauvage.

Film_title: Zwei Frauen für alle Felle - Neues Glück
Yaarra Antha Paiyan Naanthan Antha Paiyan
Description: Vijay and Shalini’s marriage is crumbling under constant misunderstandings. In the same city, Deepika loses her alcoholic husband Manikandan and is left drowning in loneliness. Seeking comfort, Deepika and Vijay cross the line and fall into a secret affair.But danger strikes when Sukumar, a corrupt sub-inspector obsessed with Deepika, begins hunting her for his own desires. As guilt closes in on Vijay and suspicion rises for Shalini, Deepika is trapped between a forbidden relationship and a ruthless predator. Will Shalini discover the truth? And can Deepika escape Sukumar’s grip before everything collapses?

Set in the suburbs of Paris within a matriarchal community of Chilean women working in the cleaning industry, Rosa follows the discovery of a secret diary. It is both the day after and the morning before: the film occupies a strange space between events, a magical realm. Throughout the film, the protagonists’ inner worlds structure the narrative, guiding us through a melancholic present that is altered by the intervention of a group of guardian angel-like women.
I will make it happen. I will make it.

Film_title: Zwei Frauen für alle Felle - Pferdeliebe

Description: Fuka, a top hostess who has lost sight of her own goals despite being a descendant of Ichijo Shino, the legendary "Queen" of the neon-lit district, encounters Ranmaru, a former host who once handled rough work under Shino. Enthralled by Ranmaru's strength fueled by revenge and ambition, Fuka rebels against her mother and Jin, the current "Night King" who is allied with her. However, the dark flames burning within Ranmaru's heart begin to engulf the entire neon district, drawing in Meg, one of Jin's biggest customers, and Yuka, a former hostess on the run after a shooting incident... (Story continues in "Queen of the Night vs. Night King 2")

Film_title: 乱れる人妻　男女不倫物語
Description: To support her husband, whose business has failed, Yukari works part-time as a medical secretary by day and as a delivery girl by night. She meets a doctor at work, Honma, and begins an affair with him, receiving financial support. However, a colleague discovers them in the act...

Film_title: The Wiggles: Wiggle Up, Giddy Up!
Description: Saddle up for The Wiggles' most ambitious adventure yet, a country music extravaganza packed with boot scootin' tunes, legendary collaborations, and enough "yee-haw!" moments to get the family line dancing in the living room!

Film_title: City of Desire No.11: The Mechanism Behind Sexual Harassment Business Schemes

Description: A shy young man living under his overprotective father's shadow finally dares to fall in love with his confident colleague. When his father sabotages the relationship by creating a love triangle with another man, chaos follows. Caught between rivalry, misunderstandings, and self-doubt, he must find the courage to stand up for his love, confront his fears, and claim his own identity.
A Film by Zekarias Wondifraw

Hashtag Star follows the story of a social media influencer. Just when everything seems perfect, a forgotten mistake from her past resurfaces. As secrets discloses in the public eye, a celebrated social media influencer is forced to confront the truth, testing her reputation, relationships, and the cost of online fame.

Film_title: カルテットという名の青春
Basique, le concert - Balavoine : Ma bataille

Description: A collage of 61 short clips concerning fashion, beauty, and trends, drawn from films, TV shows, and advertisements. Presented and curated by Mode & Mode, a meta-publication about fashion publishing, the film follows their characteristic meta style, coming together as a film about films concerning fashion.
After the events of The Fight of the Alphas #1, Alpha Buck and Alpha Bear return to their childhood place, but this time... with telekinetic powers.

Film_title: Turisme per la memòria. 30 anys de Marc Parrot

Description: What Clint can't express in words, he sings it with those of others, run through by the songs as if by a shiver. But when you're a musician, if you want to shine, you have to compose...

Twelve-year-old Anya discovers a mysterious stranger in her secret hideout after another quarrel with her mother. A stranger who has settled in an abandoned house next door reveals to the girl a fantastic world that was hidden in the routine of summer cottage life. However, not everyone is ready to understand her friendship with an adult man, who obviously has something to hide. Anya is also shocked and disappointed when it turns out that she is not the only one — the mysterious stranger also communicates with her friend Amaranta, also gives her gifts and tells stories. They are angry at him and at each other. The stranger is both their main secret and a bone of contention.
After a night out, Nessa returns home, and she’s greeted by her rapist.

A small-town beauty pageant queen, trapped by scripted smiles and expectations of perfection, secretly finds freedom in fishing and must decide whether to maintain her poise on stage or reclaim her true identity before the State pageant.
A serial killer struggles with an identity crisis, psychosis, and a toxic relationship. He’s trying to find a way to live a calmer, more peaceful life.
To avoid an unwanted marriage, a young woman hires a struggling actor to stage a fake wedding, only for the plan to spiral into unexpected complications.
Grandma’s antique toy wreaks havoc on a retirement community.

Film_title: 11e edition de La Nuit de la Deprime aux Folies Bergère

Description: Have you ever had a dream that, that you, um, you had, your, you, you could, you'll do, you, you wants, you, you could do so, you, you'll do, you could, you, you want, you want them to do you so much you could do anything?

Film_title: Richard Wagner: Lohengrin @ Baden-Baden Easter Festival 2026
Description: Wagner’s sixth opera, “Lohengrin,” tells the medieval legend of the Knight of the Swan: the knight Lohengrin is sent to protect Duchess Elsa of Brabant, who has been unjustly accused of murder. Johannes Erath directs the production, and Joana Mallwitz conducts the orchestra. Piotr Beczała plays the title role. Rachel Willis-Sørensen plays Elsa of Brabant.

Two young cousins are tasked with the simple chore of picking up their estranged uncle from the hospital and dropping him off at their grandmother's house, all of which turns into a full day's affair, culminating in a treasure-hunt in the Florida Everglades where new family perspectives are discovered.
When a person, driven by self-hatred and inner pain, harms others and betrays friendship in the name of revenge.

Film_title: Bernard Mabille à La nouvelle Ève

Description: 2026 Bangladeshi television film directed by Faisal Khan Shuvo Sei Ami Nei Ami.
Documentary short about artist Akinsanya Kambon.

During a rare visit from her tradition-minded grandmother, a young Indian girl lets slip that she's left handed. Horrified, her grandmother and aunt set out to change that, and a battle of wills ensues.

"Trouble Trio" follows three inseparable best friends, Alex, Zara, and Josh, as they navigate secondary school. This hilarious comedy is packed with crazy situations as the trio finds themselves in one misadventure after another. Throughout their escapades, their friendship is constantly tested, and they learn valuable lessons about growing up and discovering who they are. Get ready for loads of laughs, heartwarming moments, and unforgettable fun as they experience the challenges and joys of becoming young adults together!

Studios: Gouvernement de la République du Bénin
ADAC - Agence de Développement des Arts et de la Culture du Bénin
SRTB - Société de Radio et de Télévision du Bénin

Description: #NTK25 –Live in Concert was recorded during Anastacia's acclaimed NOT THAT KIND tour in 2025 – pure power, soul and voice.

Presented by Mountain Designs, the Women’s Adventure Film Tour® (WAFT) returns for its 9th year, celebrating extraordinary women and their thrilling adventures. This year’s line-up features an inspiring collection of short films that highlight stories of courage, connection, and pushing beyond personal limits. From mountain peaks to ocean waves, and from the everyday to the extreme, these films showcase women from all walks of life pursuing their definition of adventure.
A transgender woman reunites with her long lost twin brother

Film_title: The Return of the Army Man
Description: The murder of an innocent civilian by the Gange's war fighters ignites the fury of Tiger, an army man who embarks on a relentless path of revenge. As he delivers justice, the law ultimately stands with him, blurring the line between vengeance and righteousness.

Film_title: Sam Sauvage à l'Hyper Weekend Festival 2026

Description: After heartbreak, Lü Xiaolong and Wen Wenwen meet by chance and road-trip across China, exposing romance scams and surviving escalating danger—until the journey leads them back to believing in love.

After a single missed phone call, a man's life is irreversibly altered. As he struggles to accept the truth behind that moment, denial slowly gives way to resignation, forcing him to confront the consequences of one seemingly small decision and the life that follows.

The self-appointed woman representative, Grace, wants nothing but the truth. After moving in with her unemployed boyfriend in her house and providing him with all his daily needs, she hopes she is building her future husband. When she catches him cheating she feels betrayed and heartbroken. She then goes out for drinks to de-stress. Grace meets Thabo who is a player. Grace finds out that Thabo has a partner after a night of passion and loses it over the fact that Thabo lied to her. Thabo's lies lead him to being kidnapped and he cannot leave until he understands Grace's anger. Will he escape and go back to his partner? Will Grace face the consequences of her actions?

On the island of Šipan, 52-year-old Emir Slaković lives the authentic life of a Dalmatian farmer. Surrounded by a house resembling a museum of the old Dubrovnik region, traditional tools, a rich library and ship models, Emir defies the fast-paced, modern world every day. The film, through his routine, work and free time, brings an intimate and poetic dedication to the former way of life, the island and the cultural heritage that is slowly disappearing.
