This is a film about work, identity and time that is disappearing, but also a film about Emir – a film about a man!

Film_title: Produits fermiers : à boire et à manger ?

Description: A fragmented descent into cinematic obsession, Film History’s Modus Operandi blurs the line between archival media, personal documentation, and psychological collapse. Through four interconnected recovered stories — Magic Illusions, Found Objects, Monstrous Miscreation, and Or... Or... Or...Or... — the film explores the dark rituals, obsessions, and fractured realities hidden within film culture itself.

Film_title: Cérémonie de palmarès du 79e Festival de Cannes

Description: The story unfolds through the perspective of a young painter in his twenties named Kang. Torn between love and art, he finds himself standing on the fragile line between success and survival, facing the temptations of ghost painting and the shadow of forgery. At the same time, the film interweaves a story from thirty years earlier: a talented painter who, under the crushing weight of poverty, was forced to abandon his pride and create paintings under someone else’s name. Through this parallel narrative, the film contrasts the conscience of the artist with the harsh realities of life.

The brave and resourceful Yue arrives at Yuelai Inn and gathers everyone involved in a fish monster murder case three years ago in the name of holding a Mid-Autumn Festival banquet. She devises a clever plan to find out the real culprit who killed her sister Li, breaking the superstition and upholding justice.

A commando returns home as a Republic Day chief guest and forms a quiet bond with a Ph.D. student during his journey. As duty calls him away, he leaves behind an unsent letter, raising questions of love, fate, and whether their unfinished story finds closure.
The vinyasa flow is interrupted in this yoga class when the substitute yoga teacher turns out to be a spy.
Torn between the girl he loves and the future he’s always dreamed of, a boy must make the difficult decision of whether he should leave or stay.
A powerful emotional drama where deep wounds of the heart force two people to confront love, pain, and the scars left behind.
In the misty mountains, a snake catcher finds himself trapped in a double nightmare — brutal government tyranny and a plague of deadly serpents

In a village, people treat Virumandi like a god. With the help of his Bullet bike, he contests in an election. Unable to tolerate his popularity, the opposition leader Kanniyappan murders him. After his death, Virumandi appears in his assistant’s dreams and guides him to destroy the enemies and take revenge.

She (played by Lu Zi) is a top bodyguard in the security industry, while he is a key decoder who holds the key to a crucial password. To protect him and an encrypted disk that can expose the shady technological secrets, she engages in a life-and-death chase with various hunters. When her relatives betray her and trust collapses, she must choose between professional rules and justice in her heart—should she fight her way out for him or fight alone for the truth?

SG has been tracking mysterious activity at a local mental facility. No patient has ever been discharged, and there are unconfirmed reports of torture and unethical experiments on the patients. As her alter ego, she visits the facility to interview the director, Dr. Harleen Quinnzel. When the interview is cut short, she investigates Harleen's computer and finds the reports of torture are true. She rolls into action, only to discover Dr. Quinnzel's laboratory, a strange and mysterious room filled with freakish toys and torturous tools. Before she can process what she's encountered, the dolls come to life and attack her without abandon. Suddenly, Dr. Quinnzel appears on a screen. Harleen's message is clear. SG is meant to be tortured and ultimately taught a lesson. Surely, SG can escape, but the attacks come quickly and without warning. What will happen to poor SG?

In a school marked by silences and veiled prejudices, a group of Black students finds in the Black Well-Being Circle a space for listening, acceptance, and sharing. Through personal stories, pain, and dreams, they learn to transform experiences of exclusion into collective strength. When the time comes to speak in front of the whole school, Nala realizes that her voice represents not only herself, but an entire generation that insists on affirming: they belong.

Minami Yoshimura, a high school senior living in Itoshima City, meets 26-year-old hairstylist Ren Hatae at a small salon by the sea. Team captain Colt Maddox — the straight, golden-boy cowboy whose shot at going pro depends on winning State. Description: Forty years ago, on the night of April 26, 1986, the explosion of reactor number 4 at Chernobyl triggered the worst nuclear disaster in history. Description: Fără Sense is a Romanian vertical-first mockumentary series set inside a chaotic modern company where nobody truly knows what they are doing, but everyone pretends they do. Film_title: Legend of the Changbai Mountain Hunter 2
Description: In the late Republican era, strange incidents occurred frequently in a mist-shrouded mountain village deep within Changbai Mountain. A villager named Chen Gouzi encountered a mysterious bride and took her in. Soon after, he suddenly became wealthy, only to die under bizarre circumstances. A series of deaths that followed plunged the village into fear. Veteran hunter Ma Sanye led the villagers in their search for the truth, navigating between supernatural rumors and the treachery of human hearts. As they dug deeper, hidden secrets and the tangled forces of good and evil in the mountain forest gradually came to light.

Description: One day, Chanael leaves Maccabit, leaving her devastated and hurt, with their little curly twins. The problem is that Chanael and Maccabit don't really separate, they see each other every day at the girls' boarding school where they work, he as a janitor and she as a counselor. The trouble begins when Maccabit discovers that Chanael is dating one of the workers in the school, and in response, she starts going on matchmaking dates. Now Maccabit's new life is driving Chanael crazy. The little couple drama quickly shakes the entire teachers' room, which was not particularly stable to begin with.

Broke and desperate, these idiots rob a Marijuana club, not knowing this club is owned by crack kingpin, Shank who dispatches the feared killers - "The Four Horseman" to kill them. This pursuit sends a wave of violence across Oakland killing Hippies, Ninjas, Naked Clowns and just about anyone in the way.

Director: Kier Griffiths, Tyler Alexander et al
Description: A circle has no beginning and no end. Wheels burn on a road leading nowhere. The serpent consumes itself. The drive within that seeks meaning in destruction and cause for resurrection. A name from a dream and a promise: Keep Falling And I'll Find You. In Through the shadows to paradise we enter a study of cycles, repetition and drive using found and archival footage. This work synthesizes movement with a cinematic sound inspired by old Hollywood occult and the strange under belly of Americana, a liminal space where queerness lives. Through the darkness emerges an ephemeral beauty, as Kier Griffiths and Tyler Alexander-founders of HOMO- shape the visuals, with a live experimental score by Jared St. James.
A young man struggles to make it across the city to meet his friends for a night out. When every option falls through, the journey forces him to confront what he’s really chasing.

‘Hauntings’ is Barbieri’s first studio album since 2021’s ‘Under A Spell’, deepening the pensive, dark instrumental aesthetic of its predecessor. A diverse collection of immersive sound worlds, both dark & uplifting in equal measure, ‘Hauntings’ is influenced by a nostalgia for the past & future, & for things that didn’t happen yet still manage to haunt the mind & soul. What is real & what is simulation?

Almost Funny: Season 3 is a comedy anthology filmed in VRChat, hosted by BardicRJ, with musical performances by WHSPRS. Each entry is a standalone short film spanning absurdist fiction, dark satire, and genre parody - connected by musical interludes and an ongoing narrative thread. The season follows a misdelivered package that draws in a hitman, a mobster who can't get anyone to disrespect him correctly, a magic academy thrown into chaos by a new student, and a direct-to-video psychic rivalry stretched across multiple sequels. A noir detective works nights and narrates over a deal gone wrong, while a volatile detective's interrogation methods prove difficult to justify. Running between the one-offs is "The Plot" - a recurring storyline that builds across the season toward questions of memory, identity, and whether its characters are who they believe themselves to be.

Born out of a commitment to the idea that it’s never too early to introduce kids to the pleasures of movies made outside of the commercial mainstream—and the suspicion that young audiences are often more open-minded and curious than their elders when it comes to such matters—Metrograph presents the latest iteration of Art Cinema for Tots, a celebration of handcrafted, kid-friendly films that reconcile the smart and the silly. In this edition, join us for Journeys, a suite of enchanting, adventurous shorts, including Charlie Chaplin’s early silent family outing gone awry, A Day’s Pleasure, and Hermína Týrlová’s lively stop-motion animation The Little Train, about a cheeky little coal train who gets tired of working and attempts to set off to see the world!

Film_title: Chabot Big Band Jazz Concert featuring Bryan Davis
Description: The Chabot College Jazz Studies program continued its high-octane Spring 2026 concert season with a thrilling big band showcase, headlined by an internationally acclaimed trumpet virtuoso. Bryan Davis: A world-renowned lead trumpet player and educator based out of New York, Davis brought his blistering range, impeccable technique, and signature high-note artistry to the East Bay. Known globally for his work with top-tier ensembles like the Vanguard Jazz Orchestra, Arturo Sandoval, and various Broadway orchestras, Davis also widespread recognition for his "Airflow Music" educational platform and daily practice advocacy.

In a time when the abortion debate continues to divide culture, politics, and communities across America, this deeply emotional film cuts through the noise to tell a raw and unforgettable human story, one that challenges audiences to see the person behind the issue. EDEN’S CHOICE follows the journey of 13 year old Eden, a young girl facing abuse, poverty, and an unplanned pregnancy. As her family crumbles and her circumstances spiral beyond her control, Eden is forced to make a decision that will shape the rest of her life. Choosing courage over fear, she makes the life altering decision to choose life. What follows is a powerful journey of sacrifice, perseverance, and ultimately, redemption, as Eden comes to understand the profound impact of her choice years later.

Film_title: Moana Jr: The Ranches Academy School Performance
Description: Live Recording of the Ranches Academy School Performance of "Disney’s Moana JR", a musical adaptation of the 2016 Disney animated film, bringing the adventures of Moana and her village of Motunui to life onstage. Moana JR. features all the beloved songs from the film, written by Tony®, GRAMMY, Emmy, and Pulitzer Prize-winning composer Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foa’i, and Mark Mancina, including “How Far I’ll Go,” “Shiny,” and “You’re Welcome.” This thrilling and heartwarming coming-of-age story follows the strong-willed Moana as she sets sail across the Pacific to save her village and discover the truth about her heritage. Moana and the legendary demigod Maui embark on an epic journey of self-discovery and camaraderie as both learn to harness the power that lies within. With empowering messages of bravery and selflessness, Moana JR. is sure to bring out the hero within each of us.

Written and directed by Richard Grieco (21 Jump Street), the film showcases a deeply personal and compelling story brought to life by an outstanding ensemble cast.

With no body and too many secrets, suspicion deepens, truth blurs, and a haunting question remains, who moved the dead, and why?
